Accursed Forge-Spurned.name: Accursed Forge-Spurned
Accursed Forge-Spurned.description: This undead dwarf has gorged on suffering over the centuries, and in that time has grown immense himself, so that he is proportioned more like a giant than a dwarf.

items.name: Eternal Damnation
items.description: As long as its soul chain remains intact, the accursed forge-spurned can't be truly destroyed and rises again fully healed at the next sundown, even if its physical body was destroyed.

items.name: Searing Heat
items.description: A creature that touches the accursed forge-spurned (including @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grappling} it or hitting it with an unarmed attack) takes @Damage[4d6[fire]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic] save).

items.name: Forge Breath
items.description:
The accursed forge-spurned breathes a cloud of stinging soot, ash, and glowing embers. This can affect either a @Template[cone|distance:30] or a @Template[burst|distance:20] centered on the accursed forge-spurned and persists for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Creatures that move into or start their turn in the area take @Damage[12d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:blinded] save).

A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] for 1 minute. Creatures within the cloud are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W], though not from the accursed forge-spurned.

The accursed forge-spurned can't use Forge Breath again until it has used Inflate Bellows.

items.name: Inflate Bellows
items.description:
Требования: The accursed forge-spurned has used Forge Breath.

Эффект: The accursed forge-spurned re-inflates its flaccid lungs, enabling it to use Forge Breath again.

items.name: Soul Chain
items.description:
If a creature is slain by an attack from the soul chain and the accursed forge-spurned is able to retain the creature's corpse, it can bind the creature's soul into the soul chain (as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYmXvS9NJ7QwfWGg]) with a day of work at a forge and a @Check[crafting|dc:20|name:Soul Chain Bind] check.

An individual whose soul is bound in this way can't be resurrected unless the soul chain is destroyed (Hardness 10, 40 HP, BT 20).

items.name: Выкачивание души
items.description:
When the accursed forge-spurned critically hits a target with its soul chain, the chain leeches away a portion of the target's soul. The target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:36] save.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: Цель @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощена 1}.

Провал: Цель @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощена 2}.

Критический провал: Цель @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощена 2} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлена 2} от боли.

Acidic Needle Launcher.name: Acidic Needle Launcher
Acidic Needle Launcher.descriptionHazard: A ceiling-mounted launcher rains resinous needles onto intruders, after which the needles melt into acid.
Acidic Needle Launcher.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:36|name:Disable Firing Mechanism|traits:mechanical,trap,complex] to disable some firing mechanisms, making three adjacent squares in the trapped area safe to enter.
Acidic Needle Launcher.routine: (3 actions) The acidic needle launcher fires a needle at a random target in the area indicated on the map.

items.name: Needle Rain
items.description:
Триггер: A creature moves into the area indicated on the map

Эффект: The trap shoots an acidic needle at a random target in the area indicated on the map, then rolls initiative.

Aiudara Wraith.name: Aiudara Wraith
Aiudara Wraith.description: Dahak's influence in Alseta's Landing created a soul-draining effect that slays unprotected creatures within, transforming them into ghostly creatures known as aiudara wraiths, but these rare undead can rise within modern aiudara portals as well. Each time an individual travels through an aiudara, there's a chance their passage could leave a faint imprint of their subconscious in the network. Normally this imprint simply fades away, but when an aiudara is damaged or the individual is suffering from necromantic contagions, these imprints can accumulate and, in time, coalesce on the Astral Plane or within Alseta's Landing as a full-fledged aiudara wraith. The wraith is forced to live with an incomplete sense of self, always seeking its own memories and swiftly growing violent and vengeful as its quest to reclaim these ephemeral notions constantly meets with failure.

items.name: Teleportation Attachment
items.description:
Триггер: A creature within 60 feet uses a teleportation effect

Эффект: The aiudara wraith teleports with the creature, arriving in an empty space of its choice adjacent to the triggering creature's destination. If the triggering effect targets multiple creatures, the aiudara wraith chooses which creature it arrives beside.

items.name: Dimensional Shunt
items.description:
The aiudara wraith's touch displaces creatures and flings them through space. The creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:40] save.

Критический успех: The creature is unaffected and becomes temporarily immune to dimensional shunt for 1 minute.

Успех: The creature is pushed 5 feet in a random direction.

Провал: The creature is teleported 20 feet in a direction of the aiudara wraith's choice.

Критический провал: As failure, but the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

items.name: Истощение жизни
items.description:
When an aiudara wraith damages a living creature with its spectral hand Strike, the aiudara wraith gains 18 temporary Hit Points and the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:40|options:inflicts:drained,inflicts:stupefied] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} as long as it is drained. Further damage dealt by the aiudara wraith's spectral hand Strikes increases the value of the drained and stupefied conditions by 1 each on a failed save, to a maximum of 10 for both.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.LRIYUFQ7FE9H4RWD]

items.name: Instantaneous Movement
items.description: An aiudara wraith moves by means of localized teleportation. An aiudara wraith's Stride does not have the move trait. When an aiudara wraith Strides, it reaches its destination within the range of its Speed immediately.

items.name: Запугивающий удар
items.description: Alak's blow not only wounds creatures but also shatters their confidence. He makes a melee Strike. If he hits and deals damage, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical hit.

items.name: Мощная атака
items.description: Alak unleashes a particularly powerful attack that clobbers his foe but leaves him a bit unsteady. He makes a melee Strike. This counts as two attacks when calculating his multiple attack penalty. If this Strike hits, he deals an extra die of weapon damage.

Aluum Enforcer.name: Aluum Enforcer
Aluum Enforcer.description:
The most common aluum is powered by the bound soul of a loyal city servant, but its creation is among the Pactmasters' most guarded secrets. There are dozens of dormant aluums spread throughout Katapesh, and only someone wearing an aluum charm can activate and command one of these 14-foot-tall soldiers. The Pactmasters entrust few beyond the Zephyr Guard to carry these charms, and stealing such a charm is one of the most severe crimes in the city.

Aluums are powerful metal and stone constructs originally created by the Pactmasters to maintain order in Katapesh. The construction of each aluum includes the creation of an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bU731I8njNmSAQhQ], a brass pendant set with a blue crystal designed to control that particular construct. The charm constructed at the same time as an aluum is called its linked charm.

items.name: Aluum Antimagic
items.description: Aluum enforcers are immune to spells and magical abilities, with two exceptions. A void spell or magical ability grants an aluum enforcer the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl] condition until the end of its next turn instead of its normal effects. A vitality spell or ability makes an aluum enforcer @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of its next turn instead of its normal effects.

items.name: Paralyzing Force
items.description: A creature damaged by the aluum enforcer's fist Strike must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:27] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] for 1 round. On a critical failure, the creature is paralyzed for [[/gmr 1d4 #minutes]]{1d4 minutes} and falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60].

items.name: Soul Shriek
items.description:
The aluum enforcer emits a keening wail in a @Template[cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[9d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:27|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stunned] save). A creature that fails its save is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} on a critical failure.

The aluum can't use Soul Shriek again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Soul Shriek]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Уязвим к рассеиванию магии
items.description: The animated dragonstorm can be targeted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ihbRf964JDXztcy3] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]. If targeted by such a spell of 9th rank or higher, the construct loses its resistance to acid, cold, electricity, fire, and physical damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Channel Dragonstorm
items.description: The animated dragonstorm directs a @Template[cone|distance:30] of dragonstorm energy. This deals @Damage[3d8[acid],3d8[cold],3d8[electricity],3d8[fire],3d8[poison]|options:area-damage]{3d8 acid, 3d8 cold, 3d8 electricity, 3d8 fire, and 3d8 poison damage} to creatures in the cone (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic|options:area-effect] save). The animated dragonstorm can't use Channel Dragonstorm again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Channel Dragonstorm]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Destructive Strikes
items.description: The animated dragonstorm's attacks ignore the Hardness of objects with Hardness 20 or less.

items.name: Dragonstorm Strike
items.description: On a critical hit, the animated dragonstorm's fist bursts with dragonstorm energy. The target takes 1d6 acid, 1d6 cold, 1d6 electricity, 1d6 fire, and 1d6 poison damage.

Ash Web.name: Ash Web
Ash Web.descriptionHazard: This dangerous sooty black mold readily releases its toxic spores when disturbed. The entire swath of fungus in area B2 is a single organism. There are nine 10-foot-square patches to remove, but the whole organism dies once it takes enough damage.
Ash Web.disable: @Check[survival|dc:27|name:Remove Patch|traits:environmental,fungus] (expert) to remove a 10-foot-square patch of ash web without triggering the spores
Ash Web.reset: This large patch of ash web resets automatically at the start of the round.

items.name: Взрыв спор
items.description:
Триггер: A creature moves into the ash web's space or damages the web with any type of damage other than cold damage.

Требования: The ash web is not in direct sunlight.

Эффект: The triggering creature and all creatures within 10 feet of that creature are exposed to ash web spores.

items.name: Ash Web Spores
items.description:
The enfeebled condition from ash web remains even after the poison's duration ends. The condition's value reduces by 1 per hour. Gugs are immune to this poison; instead, they have vivid and strange dreams when they sleep after ingesting ash web.

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:29]

Макс.продолжительность: 6 раундов

Стадия 1: @Damage[2d6[poison]] и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблен 1} (1 раунд)

Стадия 2: @Damage[4d6[poison]] и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблен 2} (1 раунд)

Стадия 3: @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} (1 round).

items.name: The Extraplanar Registry
items.description: This book is written in Infernal. Anyone who can read it can use this detailed tome to gain a +2 item bonus to Recall Knowledge about outsiders, but it has a greater value-contained within its pages are full details on three rituals: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7DN13ILADW2N9Z1t], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2CNqkt2s2IYkVnv6], and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vgy00hnqxN9VoeoF].

items.name: Manacles (Good) (Marked with the Symbol of the Scarlet Triad)
items.description:
Вы можете надеть кандалы на кого-то, кто готов или иным образом находится в вашей власти. Надевание кандалов — активность режима исследования занимающая 10–30 секунд, в зависимости от размера существа и количества кандалов, которые вы применяете. Двуногое существо со скованными ногами получает штраф обстоятельства −15 футов к Скоростям, а двурукое существо с закованными запястьями должно преуспеть в @Check[flat|dc:5]{Чистой проверке} каждый раз, когда использует действие @Trait[Manipulate]{воздействия}, иначе это действие проваливается. Этот КС может быть выше, в зависимости от того, как туго кандалы сковывают руки. Существо, прикованное к неподвижному объекту, становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Обездвижено}. Для существ с большим или меньшим количеством конечностей, Мастер определяет, имеют ли кандалы вообще какие-то эффекты.

Освобождение существа из хороших кандалов требует 5 успешных проверок @Check[thievery|dc:32|traits:action:pick-a-lock]{Воровства}.

items.name: Keys to Each Dormitory Door and Slave Manacles
Истощить предмет силы
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Требования: Barushak hasn't acted yet on this turn.

Эффект: This turn, Barushak can cast one prepared spell he has already cast today without spending a spell slot. He must still Cast the Spell and meet the spell's other requirements.

items.name: Эффективная поимка
items.description:
Требования: Barushak has manacles in hand and is adjacent to a creature.

Эффект: Barushak attempts to bind the creature's wrists or ankles with the manacles. He must succeed at an attack roll with a [[/r 1d20+21 #Manacles]]{+21} modifier against the target's AC.

items.name: Fiend Summoner
items.description: Barushak can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.29ytKctjg7qSW2ff] spells as arcane spells. Each time he does so, sinister energies flow through his body, causing his eyes to glow red and making him @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl] for 3 rounds. He can use the extra action only to Sustain the Spell.

items.name: Superlative Summoner
items.description: If another creature's reaction would disrupt Barushak's spellcasting action, Barushak attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15] check. If he succeeds, his action isn't disrupted.

Barzillai's Hounds.name: Barzillai's Hounds
Barzillai's Hounds.descriptionHazard: Hell hounds invisible to all but their lone target burn their chosen victim.
Barzillai's Hounds.disable: @Check[religion|dc:24|name:Exorcise the Hounds|traits:complex,haunt,hazard] (expert) to perform an exorcism (with 2 actions)
Barzillai's Hounds.reset: If their designated target dies or the hounds can't reach it in a turn, the hounds vanish into noxious smoke, but they manifest again elsewhere in the city after the next sunset.
Barzillai's Hounds.routine: (2 actions) The haunt uses its first action to Stride (Speed 60 feet), then its second action for a jaws Strike against its designated target if it is in reach. If the target is not in reach, the haunt resets.

items.name: Begin the Hunt
items.description:
Триггер: A creature that doesn't openly wear the symbol of Asmodeus comes within 60 feet of the haunt's initial location.

Эффект: The hounds appear before the chosen target and begin to chase that creature, howling wildly. The haunt rolls initiative. Others cannot see or hear this baying and must @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ] to determine the hounds' location.

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description:
Belmazog spews a gout of acid that deals @Damage[10d6[acid]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save).

Belmazog can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Заглушающий гул
items.description:
Триггер: Belmazog or one of her allies within 60 feet attempts a saving throw against an auditory or sonic effect.

Эффект: Belmazog releases a croak that drowns out other sound. She rolls a Performance check. She and boggard allies in the area can use the higher result of her Performance check or their saves to resolve the effects against the auditory or sonic effect.

items.name: Nul-Acrumi Vazghul Ritual
items.description: This rare and highly specialized ritual, taught to Belmazog by the Scarlet Triad, allowed her to use the fossilized remains of Dahak to erect powerful defenses in the region in the form of dragon pillars, but the resources and time required to perform the ritual again are not available to Belmazog during the course of this adventure. As a result, and since there is no way for the PCs to learn or benefit from the ritual, further information beyond the repercussions detailed in the adventure itself are not presented here.

items.name: Болотная поступь
items.description: Belmazog ignores difficult terrain caused by swamp terrain features.

items.name: Ужасающее кваканье
items.description: Belmazog unleashes a terrifying croak. Any non-boggard within 30 feet becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} unless they succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save; those who critically succeed are temporarily immune for 1 minute.

items.name: Захват языком
items.description: If Belmazog hits a creature with her tongue, that creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] by Belmazog. Unlike with a normal grab, the creature isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe], but it can't move beyond the reach of Belmazog's tongue. A creature can sever the tongue by hitting AC 25 and dealing at least 8 slashing damage. Though this doesn't deal any damage to Belmazog, it prevents her from using her tongue Strike until she regrows her tongue, which takes a week.

Bida.name: Bida
Bida.description:
Bidas are black-scaled dragons with long, serpentine bodies and bat-like wings. Their legs and claws are smaller than those of most dragons, but their powerful undulating coils, like those of a boa constrictor, are potent weapons capable of squeezing the life from several unfortunate victims at a time.

A bida uses its impressive intellect and powerful magic to pose as a humanoid and infiltrate a settlement. Over the course of weeks or months, it establishes itself as a key member of the village, and only after it has become invaluable to the community does it reveal the terrible price of its assistance: regular offerings of flesh and gold. From this point on, the bida dwells almost exclusively within its smoggy lair, growing fat off the blood of its sacrificial offerings. To hide its presence from the outside world, a bida conceals its enslaved settlement in a large-scale illusion, leaving only a stand of jungle trees where once a thriving village may have been and ordering the townsfolk to destroy any roads in and out of town.

Bidas begrudgingly tolerate others of their kind, instead preferring the company of their small, tasty thralls. In rare cases, a pair of bidas may join forces to conquer a particularly large settlement, extracting that much more wealth from the populace as a result of their partnership.
Bida.allSaves: +2 circumstance to all saves to disbelieve illusions

items.name: +2 Circumstance to All Saves to Disbelieve Illusions
Сжимать
items.description:
@Damage[(1d6+6)[bludgeoning]], простой спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:26|basic]{Стойкости}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

items.name: Eight Coils
items.description: A bida can Strike with its tail even while Grabbing creatures with it. The bida can have up to eight Medium or smaller creatures grabbed with its tail at a time; it can also grab Large creatures, but they count as four Medium creatures for this purpose.

items.name: Mask Settlement
items.description: By concentrating for 4 hours, the bida hides a small settlement. This is a 5th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX] spell, except the area is a @Template[burst|distance:500] and creatures are invisible while inside structures in the area. The bida can conceal only one settlement at a time, and must concentrate on the effect for 10 minutes at the beginning of each day to maintain the illusion.

Black Powder Bomb.name: Black Powder Bomb
Black Powder Bomb.descriptionHazard: Three bulky kegs of black powder placed at key locations in the temple are triggered to explode in unison, causing the entire structure to collapse into rubble and slide partially down the cliff face.
Black Powder Bomb.disable:
No special skills are required to disable this manually activated trap. As an Interact action, a PC can sweep aside some black powder to interrupt the fuse line, but this doesn't prevent Gerhard from activating a keg via blunderbuss. A keg that is removed from its position (either by being thrown over the cliff or merely carried away) retains its explosive potential, but as long as one of the three kegs are removed they no longer have the precise placement required to trigger a collapse-an explosion at this point merely inflicts fire damage in the appropriate areas but does not particularly damage the temple structure itself.

A keg's contents can be dispersed by scattering the gunpowder to the wind (most efficiently by pouring it over the cliff side) as a 2-action activity, or rendered permanently inert by pouring a gallon of water into the powder, inhibiting its explosive qualities. The kegs themselves can be destroyed with damage (note that the AC listed below for each keg takes into account the fact that Gerhard has wedged the kegs into nooks in the temple's stone flooring and walls), but note that any fire damage (including incidental fire damage from area effects like a fireball or Gerhard's blunderbuss) causes them to explode. At your option, other actions may be similarly effective at disabling this hazard.
Black Powder Bomb.routine: If Gerhard lights the black powder fuse, it burns at a speed of 10 feet each round; when the fuse reaches a keg 6 rounds later, the black powder bomb explodes. The bomb explodes immediately if he shoots a barrel with his blunderbuss.
Black Powder Bomb.stealth: The three powder kegs aren't particularly well hidden, but they are out of sight to casual observation.

items.name: Destructive Explosion
items.description:
Триггер: One of the three kegs takes any fire damage, including damage caused by a line of black powder burning up to a keg.

Эффект: The keg explodes, causing @Damage[5d6[fire]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic|traits:mechanical,trap]) in a @Template[emanation|distance:20]; this can cause an instantaneous chain reaction if either of the other kegs are in this area (note that as positioned, all three kegs are in range to trigger a chain reaction). Fire damage in overlapping areas isn't cumulative, but if all three kegs are in their initial positions when the explosion occurs, the temple itself collapses, causing @Damage[8d6[bludgeoning]] damage to all creatures in the temple (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic|name:Temple Collapse|traits:mechanical,trap]).

Blood Boar.name: Blood Boar
Blood Boar.description:
Blood boars are fearsome swine bred in Cheliax for the singular purpose of hunting down escaped slaves. The species originated from a type of large feral boar native to Nidal's shadowy Uskwood, and blood boars retain their predecessors' gray fur, red eyes, and exceptional senses. The intensive breeding process to produce blood boars-augmented by the selective application of magic-grants the creatures an unparalleled awareness of blood, including the ability to precisely detect a bloodied creature's location and movements, allowing the boars to track their prey from up to a mile away.

Blood boars' keepers groom and mark the animals to enhance their already unsettling appearance. While from a distance, a blood boar might be mistaken for an ordinary pig, up close the differences are stark. Blood-red eyes, ashen fur, and unnaturally sharp tusks frame hundreds of pounds of raw muscle, the veins of which can be seen through the boar's ghastly pale flesh. Chains, manacles, and spikes are typical blood boar accessories, ensuring the boars are as fearsome as possible.

A blood boar's ability to track its quarry using only the scent of the target's blood has been the bane of many thieves, brigands, and the occasional illicit lover, but none have as much cause to fear the beasts as slaves in pursuit of freedom. Even washing off spilled blood does nothing to deter the blood boar's pursuit if it already has the scent. As a result, many halflings in the Bellflower Network zealously practice disarming and nonlethal combat techniques specifically to avoid accidental bloodshed during an escape.

items.name: Blood Quarry
items.description: On smelling a creature's blood, the blood boar can designate that creature as its quarry. The blood boar can smell its quarry from up to a mile away. A blood boar can have only one quarry at a time.

items.name: Чувство крови
items.description: The blood boar can precisely sense bleeding creatures within 60 feet.

items.name: Chase Down
items.description: The blood boar Strides toward its quarry, ignoring difficult terrain and gaining a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed during the movement.

items.name: Terrifying Squeal
items.description:
The blood boar lets forth a hair-raising squeal. Each creature within 30 feet must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:23] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure).

If the blood boar uses Terrifying Squeal on the same turn after using Chase Down, the @Check[will|dc:25] save DC is instead 25.

items.name: Выслеживать добычу
items.description:
The bloody blade mercenary designates a single creature as their prey and focuses their attacks against that creature. The mercenary must be able to see or hear the prey, or must be tracking the prey during exploration.

The mercenary gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seeks} their prey and a +2 circumstance bonus to Survival checks when they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Tracks} their prey. The mercenary also ignores the penalty for making ranged attacks within their second range increment against the prey they are hunting.

The mercenary can have only one creature designated as their prey at a time. If they use Hunt Prey against a creature when they already have a creature designated, the prior creature loses the designation and the new prey gains the designation. This designation lasts until their next daily preparations.

items.name: Охотничий выстрел
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Требования: The bloody blade mercenary is wielding a ranged weapon with reload 0

The bloody blade mercenary takes two quick shots against the one they hunt. They make two Strikes against their prey with the required weapon. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. Apply the mercenary's multiple attack penalty to each Strike normally.

items.name: Точный
items.description: The first time the mercenary hits their hunted prey in a round, they deal 1d8 additional precision damage.

items.name: Невероятная инициатива
items.description: Bshez gains a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls.

items.name: Fling Sand in the Eyes
items.description:
Требования: Bshez is standing in an area with loose sand or soil.

Эффект: Bshez flings sand into an adjacent creature's eyes. If the target fails a @Check[reflex|dc:38] save, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh] until the beginning of Bshez's next turn. If they critically fail, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] until the beginning of Bshez's next turn. If they succeed, they are unaffected.

Regardless of their save, they're temporarily immune until the battle ends.

items.name: Graceful Double Slice
items.description: Bshez makes two Strikes, one with each kukri, using her current multiple attack penalty. If both attacks hit, combine their damage and add any applicable effects from both weapons. This counts as one attack when calculating her multiple attack penalty.

items.name: Раздирать
items.description:
Thundering Kukri

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Rend]

items.name: Shield Breaker
items.description: When the target of Bshez's javelin Strike uses Shield Block, the Strike deals an additional @Damage[4d6[untyped]] damage to the shield.

items.name: Мастер оружия
items.description: Bshez has access to the critical specialization effects of any weapon she wields.

items.name: Инструменты вора
items.description:
Вам нужны инструменты вора для @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Вскрытия замков} или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Отключения некоторых устройств}, используя навык Воровства.

Если ваши инструменты вора поломались, их можно починить, заменив отмычки, используя @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{Запасные отмычки}, соответствующие вашему набору; это не требует использования действия "Ремонт".

items.name: Зоркие глаза
items.description: Calmont's eyes are sharp, allowing him to make out small details about @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W] or even @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML] creatures that others might miss. He gains a +2 circumstance bonus when using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ] action to find @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf] creatures within 30 feet of him. When Calmont target an opponent that is concealed from him or hidden from him, reduce the DC of the flat check to @Check[flat|dc:3] for a concealed target or @Check[flat|dc:9] for a hidden one.

items.name: Лишить преимущества
items.description: Calmont isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf], or flanking creatures of level 3 or lower.

items.name: Ловкое уклонение
items.description:
Триггер: A creature targets Calmont with an attack and he can see the attacker.

Требования: Calmont is not @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]

Calmont deftly dodges out of the way, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

items.name: Быстрый выхват
items.description: Calmont draws his weapon and attacks with the same motion. He Interacts to draw a weapon, then Strikes with that weapon.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: Calmont deals 1d6 extra damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Неожиданная атака
items.description: If Calmont used Deception or Stealth for initiative, creatures that haven't acted are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to Calmont on the first round of combat.

items.name: Связь с местом
items.description:
The Echo cannot leave the clearing.

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

items.name: Восстановление
items.description:
Candlaron's echo rejuvenates so long as Dahak's manifestation lives.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

items.name: Пугающий стон
items.description:
Candlaron's echo laments its fate, forcing each living creature within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} to attempt a @Check[will|dc:44|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened] save.

On a failure, a creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} on a critical failure). On a success, a creature is temporarily immune to the echo's frightful moan for 1 minute.

items.name: Телекинетическое нападение
items.description: The echo cries out in pain and anguish as small objects and debris fly about in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. Creatures in this area take @Damage[12d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage subject to a @Check[reflex|dc:44|basic|options:area-effect] save.

Carnivorous Crystal.name: Carnivorous Crystal
Carnivorous Crystal.description: Carnivorous crystals are strange ooze creatures native to the Plane of Earth. Unlike most oozes, their bodies are not homogeneously fluid; rather, interspersed within their glassy, viscous resin are thousands of sharp mineral formations that nevertheless possess some of the same flexibility and mobility as the rest of the creature's gooey body.

items.name: Чувствительность к движению
items.description: A carnivorous crystal can sense nearby motion through vibration and air movement.

items.name: Разделиться
items.description: Whenever the carnivorous crystal takes a critical hit from an attack that deals bludgeoning or sonic damage, or it critically fails its saving throw against an effect that deals bludgeoning or sonic damage, it might split. If the carnivorous crystal has at least 15 HP remaining after taking the damage, it splits into two identical crystals, each with half the original's Hit Points. When the carnivorous crystal splits, one crystal remains in the same space and the other appears in an adjacent unoccupied space. If no adjacent space is unoccupied, the crystal automatically pushes creatures out of the way to fill a space.

items.name: Subsonic Hum
items.description: 60 feet. A creature that enters or starts its turn within the aura must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

items.name: Кристаллизация
items.description:
Требования: The crystal has a creature engulfed.

Эффект: The engulfed creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:28|options:inflicts:petrified,inflicts:slowed] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until it is no longer engulfed. If the creature is already slowed, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg] as it is turned into crystal and expelled by the carnivorous crystal onto the ground.

In [[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours}, the petrified victim shatters and a new carnivorous crystal emerges from the remains.

items.name: Поглотить
items.description:
@Check[reflex|dc:28|traits:damaging-effect], @Damage[2d6[slashing]], [[/act escape dc=28]], Разрыв 25 (только дробящий)

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

items.name: Freeze
items.description: Until the next time it acts, the carnivorous crystal appears to be a mundane crystal formation. It has an automatic result of 40 on Deception and Stealth checks and DCs to pass as a crystal formation.

items.name: Razor Sharp
items.description: If a carnivorous crystal hits with an attack and rolls a natural 19 on the d20 roll, the attack is a critical hit. This has no effect if the 19 would be a failure.

Caustic Vapor.name: Caustic Vapor
Caustic Vapor.descriptionHazard: The door slams shut, and poison gas fills the room.
Caustic Vapor.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:36|name:Exorcise the Spirits|traits:mechanical,trap] (master) or @Check[religion|dc:36|name:Exorcise the Spirits|traits:mechanical,trap] (master) to exorcise the spirits

items.name: Breath Snatcher
items.description:
Триггер: A living creature other than an ooze spends at least 3 rounds in the room

Эффект: The trap activates and fills the area with caustic nightmare vapor, exposing all creatures within.

items.name: Caustic Nightmare Vapor
items.description:
@Trait[Ooze]{Слизь} иммуна к этому яду

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:38]

Возникновение: 1 раунд

Макс.продолжительность: 6 раундов

Стадия 1: @Damage[4d6[acid]] и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательство} (1 раунд)

Стадия 2: @Damage[6d6[acid]], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательство} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Застигнут врасплох} (1 round)

Стадия 3: @Damage[8d6[acid]], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательство}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Застигнут врасплох} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Одурманен 2} (1 раунд)

Charau-ka.name: Чарау-ка
Charau-ka.description:
Легенда гласит, что чарау-ка имеет общих предков с повелителем демонов Ангажаном, трансформировавшим мертвые тела смертных, воевавших против его культа, в результате чего они восстали как первые гуманоиды, похожие на мандрилов. Ходят слухи, что жрецы чарау-ка усовершенствовали отвратительный ритуал, заставляющий убитых перевоплощаться в новых чарау-ка, в честь этой древней легенды. В других историях говорится, что могущественные алтари, посвященные Ангажану, содержат эту силу, и что проведение ритуальных жертвоприношений перед этими магическими артефактами заставляет духов умерших возвращаться к жизни в качестве неистовых приверженцев Ангажана, повелителя тех, кто наслаждается дикостью и разрушением.

Крупнейшим оплотом чарау-ка на просторах Мванги является город Узаро (Usaro), расположенный на берегу Озера Окота (Lake Ocota). Хотя смерть их короля горилл привела к политическим потрясениям, чарау-ка с радостью объединятся, чтобы похищать или убивать любых чужаков в этом районе.

items.name: Визжащее исступление
items.description:
Триггер: Ход чарау-ка начинается.

Частота: Раз в час

Эффект: Чарау-ка @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Ускорен} до конца своего следующего хода и может использовать дополнительное действие для совершения "Перемещения" или "Удара". Из-за своих громких воплей, когда чарау-ка впадает в "Визжащее исступление", он не может говорить и автоматически критически проваливает все проверки Скрытности.

items.name: Мастерство метательного оружия
items.description: Любое метаемое чарау-ка оружие получает признак @Trait[Deadly]{смертельное d6}. Когда он метает импровизированное оружие, он не получает штраф -2 к использованию импровизированного оружия, а также не получает штраф за использования импровизированного метательного оружия с признаком @Trait[Nonlethal]{несмертельное}, для совершения смертельной атаки.

Charau-ka Dragon Priest.name: Чарау-ка драконий жрец
Charau-ka Dragon Priest.description:
Легенда гласит, что чарау-ка имеет общих предков с повелителем демонов Ангажаном, трансформировавшим мертвые тела смертных, воевавших против его культа, в результате чего они восстали как первые гуманоиды, похожие на мандрилов. items.name: Извивающийся хвост
items.description:
Триггер: Существо в досягаемости хвоста жреца использует действие @Trait[Move]{движения} или покидает клетку используя действие @Trait[Move]{движения}.

Эффект: Жрец совершает "Удар" хвостом по существу со штрафом -2. Если он попадает, он прерывает действие существа.

items.name: Пылающее дыхание
items.description:
Жрец выдыхает пламя @Template[cone|distance:30]{30-футовым конусом}, нанося @Damage[7d6[fire]|options:area-damage] (простой спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:23|basic|options:area-effect]{Рефлекса}).

Он не может снова использовать "Пылающее дыхание" [[/gmr 1d4 #Перезярадка Пылающего дыхания]]{1d4 раунда}.

items.name: Визжащее исступление
items.description:
Триггер: Ход чарау-ка начинается.

Частота: Раз в час

Эффект: Чарау-ка @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Ускорен} до конца своего следующего хода и может использовать дополнительное действие для совершения "Перемещения" или "Удара". Из-за своих громких воплей, когда чарау-ка впадает в "Визжащее исступление", он не может говорить и автоматически критически проваливает все проверки Скрытности.

items.name: Мастерство метательного оружия
items.description: Любое метаемое чарау-ка оружие получает признак @Trait[Deadly]{смертельное d6}. Когда он метает импровизированное оружие, он не получает штраф -2 к использованию импровизированного оружия, а также не получает штраф за использования импровизированного метательного оружия с признаком @Trait[Nonlethal]{несмертельное}, для совершения смертельной атаки.

items.name: Извержение вулкана
items.description:
Требования: Жрец стоит на поверхности.

Эффект: Жрец ударяет кулаками по земле, заставляя огонь вырываться из земли. Каждый не-последователь Дахака стоящий на поверхности в @Template[emanation|distance:15]{15-футовой эманации} должен преуспеть в спасброске @Check[reflex|dc:25|options:area-effect,damaging-effect,inflicts:prone]{Рефлекса}, иначе упадет @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Ничком} и получит @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning],2d6[fire]|options:area-damage].

items.name: Улучшенный нокдаун
items.description: A corrupt guard can dash their foe to the ground with a single blow. They attempt a single melee Strike. If this Strike hits, they also apply the critical success effect of a Trip. If they used a two- handed melee weapon (such as a maul) for the Strike, they can use the weapon's damage die size instead of the regular die size for the damage from a critical Trip, and they ignore Trip's requirement to have a hand free.

Crucidaemon.name: Крусидэймон
Crucidaemon.description:
Из всех способов умереть, крусидэймоны представляют, пожалуй, один из наименее желанных - смерть от пыток. За стройным телом этого `беса`, которое кажется изваянным из железа или мифрила, скрывается зловещий гнев и любовь к причинению боли. Крусидэймоны особенно любят причинять боль своими изогнутыми, зазубренными кинжалами, которые прикреплены к их телам с помощью цепи, пронзающей каждое запястье.

Существование крусидэймона посвящено тому, чтобы подвергать свою жертву вечной боли и террору. В отличие от других дэймонов, многие из которых стремятся как можно скорее полакомиться смертными душами, крусидэймон получает гораздо большее удовольствие от продления агонии своих жертв. Нередко крусидэймон будет причинять своей жертве такие мучения и боль, что когда, наконец-то, наступает конец, жертва со слезами на глазах благодарит дэймона за милость забвения. Встреча с крусидэймоном, не закончившаяся его смертью, еще далеко не завершена - крусидэймоны обладают беспредельным терпением к тем, кто осмеливается им противостоять.

Обитатели мрачного и ужасного Плана Абаддон, дэймоны сформированы и посвящены уничтожению жизни во всех ее формах. Они добиваются смерти каждого смертного существа самыми болезненными и ужасными способами, которые только возможны, и все это во служение апокалиптическим сущностям, известным как Четыре Всадника. Каждый вид дэймонов представляет разный способ смерти, и их силы почти всегда направлены на распространение этой конкретной формы смерти. С помощью этих сил, они стремятся утянуть все сущее в яму безнадежности и отчаяния, и предать все души забвению.

В то время как те, кто призывает дэймонов на Материальный План, обычно стремятся использовать разрушительные и портящие силы этих существ в своих целях, дэймоны всегда ищут способы посеять страх, сомнения и отчаяние, где бы они ни оказались. Часто дэймоны маскируют свои козни под происки других `бесов`, зная, что такая путаница усиливает страх смертных.

Хотя все `бесы` стремятся склонить смертных к жизни во зле, чтобы увеличить свою численность и силу на родных планах, дэймоны руководствуются сверхъестественной жаждой смертных душ и для их ловли используют различные методы, и не в последнюю очередь - самоцветы душ @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.9Bl1ua3uLqodv47s]{Какодэймонов}. В Абаддоне и в других запретных местах мультивселенной, души одновременно являются деликатесом, товаром и источником магической силы, а дэймоны - одни из самых больших обжор, торговцев и злоупотребляющих этим духовным "ресурсом".
Crucidaemon.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Обнаружение мировоззрения (постоянное) (только добро)
items.description:
Ваши глаза светятся и вы ощущаете ауры мировоззрения. Выберите хаос, принципиальность, зло или добро. Вы обнаруживаете ауры этого мировоззрения. Вы не получаете информации помимо наличия или отсутствия аур. Вы можете выбрать не обнаруживать существ или эффекты, о мировоззрениях которых вы осведомлены.

Только существа 6-го уровня или выше имеют ауры мировоззрений. Исключения: сакральные заклинатели, нежить или существа из Внешней Сферы.

Усиление (2-й): Вы узнаете силу и местоположение каждой ауры.

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Уклоняющийся от ловушек
items.description: Крусидэймонов практически невозможно обмануть ловушками. Когда крусидэймон совершает спасбросок против ловушки, его результат считается на одну степень лучше, чем при броске.

items.name: Daemonic Trap Making
items.description: When the crucidaemon casts its innate @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o0l57UfBm9ScEUMW] spell, it can store any arcane or divine spell of an appropriate level in the glyph, even if it can't otherwise cast the spell.

items.name: Flurry of Daggers
items.description: The crucidaemon makes two chained dagger Strikes against a single target. These attacks count toward the crucidaemon's multiple attack penalty and its multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after both attacks.

items.name: Проявление кинжала
items.description: Крусидэймон призывает новый кинжал на цепи взамен уничтоженному. Кинжалы крусидэймона нельзя разоружить и они становятся немагическими когда отсечены или после смерти дэймона.

Crucidaemon.CdescriptionGM:
Дэймонические создатели ловушек

Крусидэймоны прекрасно разбираются в изготовлении ловушек, и в своих логовах или логовах своих хозяев они расставляют лабиринты из хитрых и смертоносных ловушек, и зачарованных @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o0l57UfBm9ScEUMW]{Охранных глифов}, в которые они заманивают своих жертв. Пожалуй, страшнее его методичности в изготовлении ловушек, только медицинский интерес к изувечиванию и калечению пойманных врагов.

Дэймонические божества

Многочисленные могущественные и уникальные дэймоны-полубоги, известные под общим названием Предвестники, правят областями Абаддона. Однако, над этими полубогами, стоят сущности еще большей силы - четыре Всадника Апокалипсиса. С течением веков имена и личности конкретных всадников меняются. В настоящее время это @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.oJPwMa9xG8oMnC14]{Аполлион} (Всадник Мора), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.tcXrtRYCOr2EmgGB]{Харон} (Всадник Смерти), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.rDTXcBJ8LyqA2TkL]{Зуриэль} (Всадник Войны) и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.9eltBjLngkR9x1Xm]{Трелмариксиан} (Всадник Голода). Из всех них, лишь Харон не является новичком. Некоторые считают, что когда-то, остальными четырьмя правил "Пятый Всадник", а другие утверждают, что солнце в небе над Абаддоном, вечно покрытое затмением - все, что осталось от этого давно умершего бога.

Предвестники дэймонов

Четыре Всадника - самые могущественные из дэймонических полубогов, но они всего четверо из многих. В Абаддоне обитает гораздо больше дэймонических предвестников, каждый из которых является уникальным и могущественным полубогом, пользующимся огромным влиянием среди дэймонического рода. Джакаркас Собиратель (правитель рабского города Ожидающее Поедание), Вораша Змееподобная (супруга @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.9eltBjLngkR9x1Xm]{Всадника Голода}) и Зелишкар Горькое Пламя (покровитель поджигателей и агент @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.rDTXcBJ8LyqA2TkL]{Всадника Войны}) - вот лишь трое из десятков предвестников, которые правят царствами в Абаддоне.

Абаддон

Дэймоны - выходцы из Абаддона, плана чистого зла, для самых испорченных душ. Если Ад — это царство пыток и систематической порочности, то Абаддон - его искаженный кузен, место, где в огромных количествах можно найти только страдание и отчаяние, не имея ни строгостей Ада, ни хаотичной свободы Бездны. Для злодеев, стремящихся просто причинять зло другим, Абаддон - богатые охотничьи угодья, где можно упиваться низменностью, однако стоит предупредить посетителей: конкуренция здесь жестокая.

Дьяконы дэймонов

Каждому из четырех Всадников служит определенная категория дэймонов-слуг, известных как дьяконы. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.bb5Z4z4EHb5LbCLK]{Лейкодэймоны} служат дьяконами @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.oJPwMa9xG8oMnC14]{Всаднику Мора}. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.ytsHNgRwLzabsrZt]{Меладэймоны} служат дьяконами @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.9eltBjLngkR9x1Xm]{Всадника Голода}, а @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.iW6WKMVV3Ug8sa2q]{Танадэймоны} служат дьяконами @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.tcXrtRYCOr2EmgGB]{Всаднику Смерти}. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.GfJLotTcrZmn6tay]{Пурродэймоны} в настоящее время являются самыми могущественными из дьяконов и служат @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.rDTXcBJ8LyqA2TkL]{Всаднику Войны}, однако со временем мощь категорий дьяконов может меняться.

Самоцветы душ в качестве сокровищ

Самоцветами душ торгуют на нелегальных рынках, что является традицией, которую небожители и психопомпы считают омерзительной. Стоимость самоцветов душ варьируется, но обычно она зависит от уровня заключенной в нем души.

Самоцветы душ в качестве снаряжения

Дэймоны часто носят с собой самоцветы души - либо в качестве трофеев, либо для усиления способностей. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.9Bl1ua3uLqodv47s]{Какодэймоны} - самый распространенный источник самоцветов душ, но они также могут быть созданы заклинаниями, такими как @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYmXvS9NJ7QwfWGg]{Захват души}. Если дэймон уничтожает самоцвет души, чтобы усилить способность, заключенная в нем душа отправляется в загробный мир и может быть воскрешена обычным образом.

Дэймонический парадокс

Дэймоны воплощают собой фундаментальный парадокс: хотя они являются воплощениями смерти и стремятся поглотить все живое, сами они являются живыми существами. Некоторые говорят о славном конце времен, после которого реальность, наконец, освободится от заразы, которой является сама жизнь. Большинство дэймонов не задумываются над этим парадоксом.

Другие дэймоны

уществует столько же дэймонов, сколько и ужасных способов умереть. Кровавый сангудэймон (sangudaemon) олицетворяет смерть от потери крови, а скелетный @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.iW6WKMVV3Ug8sa2q]{Танадэймон} представляет смерть от старости. Самыми могущественными дэймонами являются @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.37FAi1y5S8snofws]{Олетродэймоны}, которые олицетворяют массовые смерти из-за апокалипсиса и конца целых миров.

Dahak's Shell.name: Dahak's Shell
Dahak's Shell.descriptionHazard: A ring of eight dragon pillar replicas mark the border of a dome of magical prismatic energy that entirely contains the Fortress of Sorrow.
Dahak's Shell.disable: Each dragon pillar that is destroyed removes the corresponding color's effect from Dahak's shell; as long as even one color remains active, the pillars marking the shell's border cannot be damaged themselves, but a successful @Check[thievery|dc:32|name:Disable Color|traits:magical,trap,hazard] (master) check or a successful @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (6th rank; counteract DC 30) against one of the eight pillars can cause a randomly determined active color in the shell defense (below) to become deactivated for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Глазной луч
items.description: The target suffers an effect corresponding to the eye beam's color. On a critical hit, the target's save result is one degree worse.

items.name: Prismatic Beam
items.description:
Триггер: a creature attempts and fails to disable one of the shell colors via Thievery or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]

Эффект: Dahak's shell Strikes the triggering creature with a random eye beam. Roll [[/r 1d8 #Eye Beam]] to determine the color:

  1. Red
  2. Orange
  3. Yellow
  4. Green
  5. Blue
  6. Indigo
  7. Violet
  8. Black

items.name: Защита панцирем
items.description: When a creature physically passes through the shell, the creature is affected simultaneously by all colors of energy currently active in the shell; apply these effects in the following order: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet, black. These effects are the same as that of the eye beams. Each effect requires its own save.

items.name: Black Eye Beam
items.description:
@Check[fortitude|dc:32|traits:hazard,trap] save.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] for 1 round.

Провал: The target is blinded for 1 hour.

Критический провал: The target is blinded for 24 hours.

items.name: Blue Eye Beam
items.description:
@Check[fortitude|dc:32|traits:trap,hazard] save.

Провал: Цель в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательстве} на 1 раунд.

Критический провал: The target is controlled by the dragon pillar and remains within 60 feet of it at all times, defending the dragon pillar from all non-Cinderclaws. While a target is controlled, it is treated as a Cinderclaw ally by the dragon pillar. The dragon pillar can control up to 3 targets at a time; any targets in excess who critically fail this saving throw are instead confused for [[/gmr 1d4+1 #Confused Rounds]]{1d4+1} rounds. A controlled creature can attempt a new Will save once every 24 hours to escape control, but doing so automatically causes the dragon pillar to attack it with a new eye beam to attempt to re-establish control. The control ends if the pillar is destroyed.

items.description: @Damage[6d6[electricity]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic|traits:evocation,custom,hazard,trap] save).

items.description:
@Check[will|dc:32|traits:hazard,trap] save.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Провал: Цель @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлена 3}.

Dahak's Skull.name: Dahak's Skull
Dahak's Skull.descriptionHazard: A pair of magical gems inside the dragon skull's eye sockets act as magical sensors with a 30-foot radius.
Dahak's Skull.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:27|name:Pry Out the Embedded Gems|traits:complex,magical,fire,trap,hazard] (expert) two times to pry the gems embedded deep in the skull's eye sockets without triggering the sensor, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (4th rank, counteract DC 22) twice to dispel both eyes.
Dahak's Skull.routine: (2 actions) On its initiative, Dahak's skull fires up to two eye beams; it must target a different creature with each attack. The eye beams can't target creatures directly below the skull.
Dahak's Skull.stealth: but @Check[perception|dc:24|name:Notice Lights in Eyes|traits:complex,magical,fire,trap,hazard] to notice that the fiery lights within the skull's eye sockets seem to be looking around the room.

items.name: Perception and Vision
items.description: Восприятие: [[/r 1d20+16 #Perception]]{+16}; @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.qCCLZhnp2HhP3Ex6], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]

items.name: Dahak's Glance
items.description:
Триггер: A living creature that is not a member of the Cinderclaws enters area C9

Эффект: One of the dragon skull's eye sockets shoots an eye beam at the triggering creature, then the hazard rolls initiative.

Dalos.name: Dalos
Dalos.description:
Dalos are reclusive fey that dwell within or near remote volcanoes and volcanic vents and resemble the massive calderas they call home. They more often dwell within the superheated confines of these locales than in the "cold wastelands" beyond their warmth and are therefore rarely encountered outside such environments. Like most fey, dalos are capricious and vengeful. They hate being disturbed above all else and will often warn away intruders with only the throw of a red-hot boulder before attacking outright.

A dalos stands 25 feet tall and weighs in excess of 20,000 pounds.

items.name: Magma Splash
items.description: Whenever the dalos takes damage from a melee Strike, magma splashes from its open wound and sticks to nearby creatures. Each creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:10] must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:31|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save. On a failure, the creature takes @Damage[3d6[persistent,fire]|options:area-damage] damage as the superheated rock sticks to them and cools. The DC to end this persistent damage decreases by 5 each turn after the first as the magma cools.

items.name: Volcanic Heat
items.description: 10 футов. @Damage[3d6[fire]|options:area-damage] (простой спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:29|basic|options:area-effect]{Рефлекса})

items.name: Отрыгнуть дым
items.description: The dalos blasts smoke from its head, creating a @Template[burst|distance:20] of smoke that drifts to a location within 120 feet. This has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm].

items.name: Heat Rock
items.description:
The dalos uses an Interact action to pluck a rock from its body or the nearby environment, then uses its internal fires to heat a rock it's holding until the rock is red hot. A heated rock that hits a target on a ranged Strike deals an additional 4d6 fire damage.

Once the dalos heats a rock, that rock retains its heat for 2 rounds before cooling.

items.name: Lava Bomb
items.description:
The dalos causes a volcanic explosion to erupt from its head, lobbing a mass of molten rock up to 100 feet. This lava bomb deals @Damage[6d8[fire],6d8[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]{6d8 fire damage and 6d8 bludgeoning damage} to each creature in a @Template[burst|distance:20]{20-foot radius} of its impact point, with a @Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect] save.

The dalos can't use Lava Bomb again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Lava Bomb]]{1d4 rounds}.

Damurdiel's Vengeance.name: Damurdiel's Vengeance
Damurdiel's Vengeance.descriptionHazard: An elven woman wearing a robe stands in the water. She beckons anyone who enters the room to join her in the pool.
Damurdiel's Vengeance.disable: @Check[deception|dc:45] (legendary) to pretend to be Erveniss and ask for forgiveness, @Check[diplomacy|dc:45] (legendary) to convince Damurdiel to stand down (elves who are masters in Diplomacy can attempt the check as if they were legendary instead), or @Check[religion|dc:40] (legendary) to call upon Calistria to calm Damurdiel's spirit.
Damurdiel's Vengeance.reset: Damurdiel's spirit subsides once she is destroyed or if she manages to reduce a creature to 0 Hit Points. She returns after 1 minute.
Damurdiel's Vengeance.routine: (3 actions) The haunt attempts to Strike with the dagger.
Damurdiel's Vengeance.stealth: (legendary) or DC 47 to notice the dagger left in the pool start to move on its own.

items.name: Неожиданный удар
items.description:
Триггер: A creature approaches within 5 feet of the pool's edge

Эффект: The ghostly elf causes a dagger to rise out of the waters and then fling toward the triggering creature. If the attack is a hit, it is a critical hit instead. The haunt then rolls initiative.

Deculi.name: Deculi
Deculi.description: These batlike monstrosities inhabit the nooks and crevices of the Darklands, where they hang from stalactites and swoop down on unsuspecting prey. Though they are completely sightless, deculis possess rudimentary nerves in their skulls that allow them to detect the presence of infrared light-information they use to locate potential food and threats. They are deadly hunters, thanks largely to their magical ability to manipulate the ebb and flow of shadows. Deculis prefer to feed upon the warm blood of freshly killed prey, but they can subsist on carrion if they have to.
Deculi.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: Теплочувствительность
items.description: A deculi can detect infrared radiation as a precise sense.

items.name: Create Shadow Sanctuary
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: The deculi creates an extradimensional space adjacent to itself in any 10-foot-by-10-foot area of darkness and enters it. To non-deculis, the extradimensional space looks like an ordinary area of darkness (though effects such as true seeing can see through this illusion). The deculi's infrared vision functions normally between this extradimensional space and the area outside its confines, allowing the deculi to sense what is going on around it, and its innate darkness spell also extends to the area around the shadow sanctuary. Attacks cannot be made into or from the extradimensional space.

The deculi can Dismiss this effect to emerge from its shadow sanctuary, but the space it emerges into must be in darkness and must be unobstructed. If the area is obstructed, the deculi is shunted to the nearest available space and takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage per 5 feet shunted. If the area overlaying the shadow sanctuary becomes illuminated by magical light, the extradimensional space can no longer be accessed and the deculi is trapped within until the area is once again in darkness. The deculi can try to extinguish a magical light effect obscuring its sanctuary once per day by attempting to counteract the light effect with its darkness innate spell.

If a deculi dies (including from hunger, thirst, or asphyxiation) while within the extradimensional space, the shadow sanctuary immediately ends and the deculi's corpse is expelled. If the area is illuminated, the corpse is not expelled until the sanctuary entrance is in darkness once again.

items.name: Shadow Strike
items.description:
Требования: The deculi is in its shadow sanctuary.

Эффект: The deculi Dismisses its shadow sanctuary. It Strides, Climbs, or Flies up to its Speed, then makes a fangs Strike that deals an additional 4d6 precision damage.

items.name: Walk in Shadow
items.description: When the deculi is Hiding in darkness and Sneaks, it can move up to its full Speed instead of half its Speed.

items.name: Шквал
items.description: Dmiri's multiple attack penalty against her hunted prey is -3 (-2 with an agile weapon) on her second attack and -6 (-4 with an agile weapon) on her third or subsequent attacks.

items.name: Выслеживать добычу
items.description:
Dmiri designates a single creature as her prey and focuses her attacks against that creature. Dmiri must be able to see or hear the prey, or she must be tracking the prey during exploration.

Dmiri gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks when she @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seeks} her prey and a +2 circumstance bonus to Survival checks when she @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Tracks} her prey. Dmiri also ignores the penalty for making ranged attacks within her second range increment against the prey she is hunting.

Dmiri can have only one creature designated as prey at a time. If she uses Hunt Prey against a creature when she already has a creature designated, the prior creature loses the designation and the new prey gains the designation. Dmiri's designation lasts until her next daily preparations.

items.name: Цель охотника
items.description: When Dmiri focuses on aiming, her attack becomes particularly accurate. Make a ranged weapon Strike against her hunted prey. On this Strike, Dmiri gains a +2 circumstance bonus to the attack roll and ignores her prey's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W] condition.

items.name: Парное парирование
items.description:
Требования: Dmiri is wielding two melee weapons, one in each hand

Dmiri uses her two weapons to parry attacks. Dmiri gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of her next turn, or a +2 circumstance bonus if either weapon has the parry trait. Dmiri loses this circumstance bonus if she no longer meet this ability's requirement.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.eu2HidLHaGKe4MPn]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.EDpjey6SCdvIYqEc]

items.name: Парный удар
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Требования: Dmiri is wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand

Dmiri swiftly attacks her hunted prey with both weapons. Make two Strikes against Dmiri 's hunted prey, one with each of the required weapons. If both hit the same hunted prey, combine their damage for the purpose of its resistances and weaknesses. Apply Dmiri 's multiple attack penalty to each Strike normally.

Doorwarden.name: Doorwarden
Doorwarden.description:
Doorwardens are constructs originally invented by elves. Upon first glance, these guardians resemble ornate doors made entirely of steel or even dawnsilver, but when trespassers try to force their way past, the doorwarden transforms into a skilled and sturdy soldier bearing its "door" like a towering shield.

Perceptive travelers can sometimes spot a door warden before its magic becomes obvious. The door often bears a round disk or similar embossment that resembles a shield boss designed for bashing, and the bar that can be lowered to block entry resembles an arm clasping a longsword by the hilt. The original doorwardens crafted by the elves included a motif of elven armor and a metal mask in the style of Alseta's own, though other cultures embellish their own doorwardens with their own themes and sometimes even their own ancestral weapons, such as axes for dwarven doorwardens.

Doorwardens sometimes know about the chambers they guard, and they have been known to speak to trespassers, especially elves. But a doorwarden cannot be persuaded to stand aside; it is bound to the portal where it has been placed and will defend it until destroyed.

items.name: Защитная реакция
items.description:
Триггер: An enemy hits the doorwarden with a melee Strike.

Эффект: The doorwarden can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{Raise its Shield} and gain its shield's benefit to AC against the triggering attack.

items.name: Блок щитом
items.description:

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ShieldBlock]

items.name: Imitate Door
items.description: Until the next time it acts, the doorwarden appears to be a door. It has an automatic result of 31 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a door.

items.name: Slam Doors
items.description: The door opens and slams its doors, making two door Strikes against one creature. If both hit, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]-stuck between the doors. The doorwarden's multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until it has finished both attacks.

Dragon Pillar.name: Dragon Pillar
Dragon Pillar.descriptionHazard: A 10-foot-tall wooden pole topped by a wooden carving of Dahak's head. Each dragon pillar's head has been treated with something to give it a distinct color, as indicated in the specific encounter, but regardless of color, plumes of smoke waft up from the mouth.
Dragon Pillar.disable: @Check[athletics|dc:26|name:Push the Pillar Over|traits:complex,magical,trap,hazard] (expert) to push the pillar over, or @Check[thievery|dc:26|name:Erase Magic Runes|traits:complex,magical,trap,hazard] (expert) on the pillar to erase the magic runes that power it, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (4th rank; counteract DC 22) to dispel the pillar's magic.
Dragon Pillar.reset: The dragon pillar deactivates and resets as soon as it perceives no appropriate targets in range.
Dragon Pillar.routine: (1 action) On its initiative, the dragon pillar fires an eye beam at the closest target within 120 feet.

items.description: A dragon pillar can see through its empty eye sockets, and it can recognize Cinderclaws and their allies. A character disguised as a Cinderclaw can trick a dragon pillar into perceiving it as a Cinderclaw ally by using Deception to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]. A dragon pillar always uses Perception for initiative.

items.name: Perception and Vision
items.description: Восприятие: [[/br 1d20+16 #Perception]]{+16}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.qCCLZhnp2HhP3Ex6] 60 feet

items.description:

The control ends if the pillar is destroyed.

Dragonscarred Dead.name: Dragonscarred Dead
Dragonscarred Dead.description:
Not all would-be dragonslayers who die a valiant death rest peacefully amid the annals of legend. Sometimes, a draconic necromancer is so impressed by its fallen foe that the dragon ritually raises the dead warrior to serve the dragon in undeath. These undead guardians are infused with a fraction of the power of the dragon who slew them, channeling the same energy as their draconic masters' breath.

Dragonscarred dead are similar to skeletal champions or graveknights in that they are not merely reanimated servants who mindlessly follow orders, but are instead powerful wardens who maintain the same agency they bore in life. While a dragonscarred dead is often magically compelled to follow its reanimator's commands, some of these undead dragonslayers manage to escape their masters and pursue their own vile agendas-which may involve rallying allies to challenge their draconic creator once more and finish the dire mission they started in life.
Dragonscarred Dead.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Broken Greatsword
items.description: Этот огромный двуручный меч почти такого же роста, как и его владелец. Нижняя часть его клинка часто несколько притупляется, чтобы его можно было схватить и использовать как дополнительный упор в ближнем бою.

items.name: Guardian Sense
items.description: The dragonscarred dead is immediately aware of any intruder that enters the lair of its creator dragon. It does not know the exact location of the intruder but remains aware of the intruder's presence until the intruder either leaves or is destroyed.

- Flame (arcane, evocation, fire) A blast of flame deals @Damage[15d10[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:60] (@Check[reflex|dc:45|basic|options:area-effect] save). This fire damage does not harm objects or constructs.

- Weakening Gas (arcane, necromancy) A cloud of gold-flecked gas forces each creature in a @Template[cone|distance:60] to attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:45] save; the effect lasts 1 minute.

items.description:
