Эффект: The dragonshard guardian's body absorbs the energy entirely, preventing the damage from harming the construct. Its body reverberates and transforms the absorbed energy before projecting it outward in a @Template[burst|distance:60].

Each creature within the burst takes an amount of fire damage equal to the amount of energy damage absorbed by the triggering attack, including any damage resisted by the guardian's resistances and additional damage from its weakness (@Check[reflex|dc:45|basic] save).

This fire damage doesn't harm objects or constructs.

Dragonstorm.name: Dragonstorm
Dragonstorm.descriptionHazard: A massive storm stirs in the skies above Breachill and Citadel Altaerein. As specific events begin during the three waves of the manifestation's retribution, the dragonstorm wreaks localized havoc.
Dragonstorm.disable: The dragonstorm can't be disabled-only endured. It ends only once the attack on Breachill and Citadel Altaerein is over.

items.name: Localized Dragonstorm
items.description:
Триггер: A new wave begins

Эффект: Roll [[/gmr 1d10 #Localized Dragonstorm]] to determine which effect manifests from the following possibilities. The placement of these effects is guided by Dahak's will, and they should manifest in the most detrimental locations possible to the PCs.

items.name: 1-2 Acid Rain
items.description: A torrent of acid drenches creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:20]. Creatures in the area take @Damage[6d10[acid]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect] save). Creatures that critically fail also take @Damage[5[persistent,acid]] damage.

items.name: 3-4 Freezing Wind
items.description: A barrage of freezing wind and hail assaults all creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:20]. Creatures in the area take @Damage[3d10[cold],3d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed] save). Creatures that critically fail are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

items.name: 5-6 Bolts of Lightning
items.description: Several bolts of lightning strike all creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:20]. Creatures in the area take @Damage[6d10[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:blinded,inflicts:deafened] save). Creatures that critically fail their saves become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR] for 1 round.

items.name: 7-8 Flaming Vortex
items.description: Gouts of flame fall on all creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:20]. Creatures in the area take @Damage[6d10[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect] save). Creatures that critically fail their saves also take @Damage[5[persistent,fire]] damage.

items.name: 9-10 Poison Miasma
items.description: Poisonous mist rolls forth, covering a @Template[burst|distance:20] for 1 round. Creatures within the mist become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W], and creatures outside it become concealed to creatures within it. Creatures within the mist take @Damage[6d10[poison]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:enfeebled] save). Creatures that critically fail their saves become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}.

items.name: Dragonstorm Blade
items.description: The dragonstorm fire giant raises one hand to the sky, channeling dragonstorm energy into the blade held in the other. The giant makes a greatsword Strike with a -2 circumstance penalty against each creature within its reach. It makes only one attack roll and compares the result against each creature's AC. This Strike deals an additional 1d8 acid, 1d8 cold, 1d8 electricity, 1d8 fire, and 1d8 poison damage and counts as two attacks for the giant's multiple attack penalty.

Duergar Slave Lord.name: Дуэргар повелитель рабов
Duergar Slave Lord.description:
Глубоко под поверхностью, дуэргары упорно считают подземные земли дварфийских предков своими собственными, отказавшись выходить на поверхность вместе со своими современными сородичами-дварфами. Изгнанное дварфийское божество по имени @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.39z55kowQFOUH2v0]{Дроскар} предложило дуэргарам спасение от ужасов Темноземья, а в обмен, дуэргары бесконечно трудятся во имя него в своей подземной империи. Являясь отъявленными рабовладельцами, дуэргары регулярно совершают набеги на другие поселения Темноземья, а также на наземные общины, в постоянном поиске живых существ для выполнения в своих поселениях нескончаемой, суровой и изнурительной работы.

Дуэргары - серокожие существа, которых те наземные дварфы, которые готовы говорить о них, часто называют "пепельными". Эти подземные дварфы имеют сильную природную связь с пещерными паразитами, и часто можно увидеть караваны дуэргаров, запряженные огромными жуками. Большинство дуэргаров посвящают себя поклонению Дроскару, богу-надсмотрщику, который требует от них не только регулярных молитв, но и тяжкого труда. Правление дуэргаров часто состоит из могущественных божественных служителей Дроскара, а также невероятно выносливых воинов, чье боевое мастерство позволяет им преодолеть любую прямую угрозу их правлению. Почти все аспекты жизни дуэргарского общества контролируются строгой иерархией руководства, где надсмотрщики руководят подчиненными во всех сферах жизни.

items.name: Улучшенное уклонение
items.description: Когда повелитель рабов при спасброске Рефлекса получает успех, результат считается критическим успехом. Когда при спасброске Рефлекса он получает критический провал, результат считается обычным провалом. При провале спасброска Рефлекса против наносящего эффекта он получает половину урона.

items.name: Выслеживать добычу
items.description:
Повелитель рабов обозначает своей добычей 1 существо, которое может видеть или слышать, либо которое "Выслеживает". Повелитель рабов получает бонус обстоятельства +2 к проверкам Восприятия на @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Поиск} добычи и проверкам Выживания на @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Выслеживание} добычи. Еще он игнорирует штраф за совершение дистанционных атак во втором шаге дистанции.

Когда повелитель рабов попадает по добыче первый раз за раунд, то наносит дополнительные @Damage[2d8[precision]]. Повелитель рабов может одновременно обозначить своей добычей только 1 цель.

items.name: Шквал охотника
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд;

Эффект: Повелитель рабов наносит 2 "Удара" из лука или 2 "Удара" ближнего боя, каждый используя другое оружие. Эти "Удары" должны быть по добыче повелителя рабов. Если оба "Удара" попадают, объедините их урон для сопротивлений и слабостей.

Duergar Slave Lord.CdescriptionGM:
Оккультные обычаи

В отличие от классических дварфов, практикующих магию, дуэргары приняли практику оккультизма. Все дуэргары обладают по крайней мере несколькими врожденными оккультными заклинаниями, главным из которых является умение магически увеличивать свои размеры. Эта сила не только помогает им запугивать и задирать своих рабов, но и служит мощным боевым средством против многочисленных врагов.

Сообщества дуэргаров

Сообщества дуэргаров находятся глубоко под землей в руинах заброшенных дварфийских городов. Поколения дуэргарской оккупации привели к утрате дварфийской истории, поскольку пепельные чтят свое божество-надсмотрщика, переделывая традиционное дварфийское искусство в темы, возвышающие изгнанного бога. То, что сами дуэргары, похоже, неспособны достичь высот мастерства, достигнутых их дварфийскими предками, является одновременно источником разочарования и стыда, что только усиливает неприязнь к тем, кто живет на поверхности.

Echoes of Betrayal.name: Echoes of Betrayal
Echoes of Betrayal.descriptionHazard: Malevolent spirits led by a ghostly image of Ludika rise and begin a deadly brawl. These spirits attempt to overwhelm living creatures, forcing them to join the battle.
Echoes of Betrayal.disable: @Check[religion|dc:35|name:Exorcise|traits:haunt,complex] (master) three times to exorcise the spirits or @Check[diplomacy|dc:39|name:Talk Down|traits:haunt,complex] (expert) three times to talk them down.
Echoes of Betrayal.reset: After 24 hours, the haunt returns. The spirits are permanently put to rest only if a lawfully appointed judge from Saggorak (or Kovlar) comes into the prison, takes damage from the haunt, and survives the attack.
Echoes of Betrayal.routine: (1 action) As 1 action, the haunt causes a barrage of ghostly fists to lash from the walls, floors, and ceiling. The haunt attempts a spectral fist Strike against each creature in area H10.
Echoes of Betrayal.stealth: (master) to hear the quiet murmurs of angry spirits

items.name: Confuse
items.description:
Триггер: At least three creatures enter area H10.

Эффект: The haunt takes control of all creatures in the prison, affecting them with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY] (8th level, @Check[will|dc:37] save).

items.name: Spectral Fist
items.description: On hit the creature must attempt a new @Check[will|dc:37|name:Spectral Fist Confusion] save against @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY] if it's not already @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ].

items.name: Двойной разрез
items.description: The Ekujae guardian makes two Strikes against the same target, one with each of their daggers. The guardian combines the damage of any attacks that hit and applies precision damage, resistance, and weaknesses only once. Both attacks count toward the guardian's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty increases only after both attacks.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: The ekujae guardian deals 1d6 extra precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Лесная поступь
items.description: The Ekujae guardian ignores difficult terrain from plants.

items.name: Winged Boots
items.description:
Made from soft leather, with delicate white wings attached to the heel, these boots are ensorcelled with powerful air magic.

Whenever you fall while wearing these boots, the boots automatically cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TTwOKGqmZeKSyNMH] on you. This benefit can't trigger again for 10 minutes.

Активация: 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F], команда

Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: You speak a command word and click the boots' heels together to cause the wings to animate and flap rapidly, granting you a fly Speed of 30 feet for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.1S51uIRb9bnZtpFU]{Effect: Winged Boots}

items.name: Сопряжённость
items.description:
Триггер: Emaliza is attacked

Эффект: A 5th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8] spell is cast on Emaliza; she uses this to escape an attack that she fears would incapacitate or kill her.

items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Требования: Emaliza hasn't acted yet on this turn

Эффект: Emaliza can cast one prepared spell she has already cast today without spending a spell slot.

items.name: Warded Casting
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Триггер: Emaliza Casts a Spell

Эффект: Emaliza's magic creates a small defensive aura around her. She gains 20 temporary Hit Points and resistance 20 to either acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage. The defensive aura remains until the beginning of her next turn.

Emperor Bird.name: Emperor Bird
Emperor Bird.description:
The emperor bird is native to the jungles of the Mwangi Expanse and known for its brilliant plumage and innate magic. While it usually feeds on lizards, big insects, and other small creatures, the emperor bird is highly territorial and not afraid to attack larger prey. Its beak, resembling that of the much smaller peafowl, is exceptionally sharp, but its deadliest weapon is its tail-the long, whiplike blades of bone hidden among its tail feathers are a nasty surprise for any predator trying to sneak up on the bird.

The emperor bird was given its current name 2,000 years ago when Taldor's Sixth Army of Exploration ventured into the Mwangi Expanse. When the legion spotted this 6-foot-long bird with its spectacular multicolored feathers trailing from its tail, wings, and crest, the soldiers thought the bird regal enough to suit their emperor, disregarding the name the Mwangi had given to the bird generations before, bebaki.

Keeping an emperor bird was, for many years, a sign of prestige among the nobility of Taldor. That was long ago, however, and emperor birds eventually fell out of fashion. Inevitably their former owners forgot about their colorful pets, and hundreds of neglected emperor birds were released back into the wild by weary servants. While many such freed birds perished quickly in the unfamiliar woodlands of Avistan, some managed to hold out, and emperor birds can still be encountered in the Verduran Forest.

The emperor bird uses its brilliant, iridescent plumage for mating displays as well as for intimidating rival suitors and potential predators. Not only are the feathers beautiful, but they are actually magical-a fact that has piqued the interest of alchemists and wizards alike, many of whom have spent decades capturing and breeding emperor birds in the hope of unlocking their arcane secrets. Mages stationed in the Mwangi Expanse will pay a pretty penny for intact feathers from these majestic creatures-or better yet, live specimens.

items.description:
The emperor bird flaps its mesmerizing wings. Each creature within @Template[emanation|distance:15]{15 feet} that can see the emperor bird must attempt a @Check[will|dc:19] save.

Провал: The creature is dazzled for [[/gmr 1d4 #Dazzled Duration]]{1d4 rounds}.

Endless Elven Aging.descriptionHazard: A haunted mural fascinates characters and swiftly drains their vitality.
Endless Elven Aging.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:38|name:Calm the Restless Energies|traits:haunt,magical] (master) or @Check[religion|dc:38|name:Calm the Restless Energies|traits:haunt,magical] (master) to calm the restless energies and suppress the haunt for 1 hour; a critical success deactivates the haunt permanently.
Endless Elven Aging.reset: The haunt continues its routine until there are no targets within 30 feet of the room. It then resets over the course of 1 minute and is able to activate again.
Endless Elven Aging.routine: (2 actions) The haunt lures creatures into area A2 using Captivate. Any actions it hasn't used to Captivate are used to drain a living creature in the room with Live a Thousand Lives.
Endless Elven Aging.hp: per square (6 squares must be destroyed to disable the haunt)

items.name: Lifelike Scintillation
items.description:
Триггер: A living creature examines the mural or enters the room

Эффект: The haunt activates and rolls initiative.

items.name: Captivate
items.description:
The faintly moving images compel one creature within 30 feet of the room to move into the room. The creature attempts a @Check[will|dc:38|traits:charm] save.

Успех: Цель невредима.

Провал: The target must spend all its actions on its next turn moving into the room, and is then @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] until the end of its next turn.

Критический провал: As failure, and the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute.

items.name: Live a Thousand Lives
items.description:
The haunt causes a living creature in the room to experience a full elven life, weathering every wound, misfortune, loss, and consequence of aging centuries in a matter of seconds. The target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:38] save.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw].

Провал: The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or its drained value increases by 1, to a maximum of drained 3), and it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] until the end of its next turn.

Критический провал: As failure, but the target also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (or its doomed value increases by 1).

items.name: Lazurite-Infused Flesh
items.description: Falrok's flesh is infused with lazurite, and he gains the benefits undead creatures gain from this mineral at all times. When in an area infused with lazurite, such as the Sanctum of the Starved, these benefits increase to a +3 circumstance bonus to saving throws against vitality effects. This infusion also grants Falrok his resistance to vitality damage.

items.name: Предательская возможность
items.description:

Эффект: When Falrok's enemy is hit by one of his allies, he capitalizes upon the distraction, making a Strike against the triggering creature.

Forge-Spurned.name: Forge-Spurned
Forge-Spurned.description: Evil dwarves who die having failed to live up to the exacting standards of the duergar god Droskar are sometimes forced to return to the material world as undead abominations known as forge-spurned.

items.name: Enternal Damnation
items.description: As long as its soul chain remains intact, a forge-spurned can't be truly destroyed. It rises again fully healed at the next sundown, even if its physical body was destroyed.

items.name: Searing Heat
items.description: A creature that touches the forge-spurned (including @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grappling} it or hitting it with an unarmed attack) takes @Damage[2d6[fire]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save).

items.name: Forge Breath

Each creature that moves into or starts their turn in the area takes @Damage[6d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage, with a @Check[reflex|dc:21|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:blinded] save. A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] for 1 minute.

Creatures within the cloud are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W], though not from the forge-spurned.

items.name: Soul Chain
items.description:

An individual whose soul is bound in this way can't be resurrected unless the soul chain is destroyed (Hardness 10, 40 HP, BT 20).

items.description:
Активация: 2

The blunderbuss fires an explosive shot that deals @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning],2d10[fire]|options:area-damage]{4d6 bludgeoning damage plus 2d10 fire damage} to all creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic|name:Shoddy Blunderbuss Reflex Save|options:area-effect|showDC:owner] save).

When firing the blunderbuss, you must critically succeed at a @Check[crafting|dc:20|name:Shoddy Blunderbuss Crafting] or @Check[engineering-lore|dc:20|name:Shoddy Blunderbuss Engineering Lore|showDC:owner]{Engineering Lore} check or the weapon explodes, damaging you for the same amount as the creatures in the cone and destroying itself. A successful @Check[crafting|dc:22|name:Shoddy Blunderbuss Reveal Unstable Nature|showDC:owner] check is enough to confirm the weapon's unstable nature if someone examines it beforehand.

Reloading the blunderbuss takes 3 Interact actions: adding 1 dose of gunpowder, adding 1 grapeshot canister, and packing the contents.

items.name: Спичка
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]

Алхимическое вещество, нанесённое на один конец этой крошечной деревянной палочки, воспламеняется при ударе о шероховатую поверхность. Создать пламя с помощью спички гораздо быстрее, чем с помощью огнива. Вы можете зажечь спичку и прикоснуться ею к горючему предмету как часть одного и того же действия.

items.name: Бездонная сумка [Вид 1]
items.description:
Хоть она и кажется матерчатой сумкой, украшенной панно из роскошно окрашенного шелка или стильной вышивкой, бездонная сумка раскрывается в магический карман, который больше, чем её внешние размеры. Масса сложенного внутрь сумки не меняет массу самой бездонной сумки. То, сколько может вместить в себя пространство сумки зависит от ее вида.

Вы можете "Взаимодействовать" с бездонной сумкой, чтобы положить в нее предметы или достать, точно так же как и с обычной сумкой или мешком. Хотя сумка может вместить большое количество вещей, объекту всё ещё надо пройти через открытую сумку, чтобы уместиться.

Если сумка перегружена или сломана, то она рвется и разрушается, в результате чего, предметы внутри навсегда теряются. Если ее вывернуть, то все содержимое высыпется из нее целым и невредимым, и ее надо будет вывернуть обратно, чтобы она снова начала работать. Живое существо, помещенное внутрь сумки имеет достаточно воздуха на 10 минут, прежде чем оно начнет задыхаться, и оно может попытаться [[/act escape dc=13]]{Вырваться}. Предмет, находящийся внутри сумки не дает никаких преимуществ, пока не вынут из неё. Предмет внутри сумки не может быть обнаружен магией, которая обнаруживает только вещи на том же плане бытия.

Вместимость: 25 Масс

This requires washing them off by bathing in water for a minute, a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Qw3fnUlaUbnn7ipC] spell, or a similar measure allowed by the GM.

Grauladon.name: Grauladon
Grauladon.description:
Grauladons are vicious predators that appear crocodilian in form, but are in fact distant offshoots of dragonkind. They make their dens in the shallows of fetid ponds or isolated corners of larger bodies of water, usually in rural swamps or woodlands. Driven almost entirely by their base desire to feed, grauladons spend most of their time swimming leisurely underwater looking for prey such as fish or waterfowl. Possessed of a greed befitting their more majestic dragon cousins, grauladons often take down prey larger than they need, jealously guarding the corpses to keep scavengers away even as the meat rots. A typical grauladon is 16 feet long from its snout to the tip of its tail and weighs 1,500 pounds.

A grauladon's stench may seem supernaturally disgusting, but it is simply the result of the creature's fetid habitat and diet of rotting, waterlogged meat. As grauladons' exhalations bear a passing resemblance to dragons' breath, they have earned the nickname "mud drakes" from rural folk.

Grauladons can be found in both fresh and brackish water in most temperate climates. They prefer to lair in shallow waters, particularly where reeds or other foliage conceal their bulk from unsuspecting prey. Grauladons are highly territorial and won't tolerate other predators living or hunting near their homes.
Grauladon.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: Reactive Breath
items.description:
Триггер: The grauladon takes damage from an adjacent creature.

Эффект: The grauladon uses Noxious Breath, including the triggering creature in the area.

items.name: Body Slam
items.description:
Требования: More than one enemy is adjacent to the grauladon.

Эффект: The grauladon swings its tail at each adjacent enemy and attempts to [[/act trip]] each creature adjacent to it. It rolls only a single Athletics check and compares the result to the Fortitude DC of each target.

items.name: Глубокий вдох
items.description: A grauladon can hold its breath for 225 rounds (22-1/2 minutes).

items.name: Noxious Breath
items.description:
The grauladon hisses and unleashes a nauseating cloud of halitosis in a @Template[cone|distance:15]. Each creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:18] saving throw or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

The grauladon can't use Noxious Breath or Reactive Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Noxious Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Graveshell.name: Graveshell
Graveshell.description:
The graveshell is a dangerous predator that draws scavengers and explorers into its grasp using a morbid lure: the corpse of a former victim impaled upon the spikes that protrude from its large, turtle-like shell. Aside from its shell, the monster resembles no known animal. Small but bright yellow eyes watch from the sagging flesh of its head, the most prominent feature of which is a curiously shaped, toothy maw twisted into a perpetual grin. Its stubby arms and legs are impractical for both walking and swimming, though the algae-caked claws tipping each limb are deadly weapons.

Graveshells are intelligent-a fact that surprises many who encounter them-and surrender rather than fight to the death. These monsters have little to offer in exchange for their lives, though the waterlogged treasures on their collection of corpses may entice opportunists.

items.name: Ракушка
items.description: A graveshell's shell has a Hardness of 6, 10 Hit Points, and a Broken Threshold of 5. If its shell is broken, the graveshell can't attack with shell spikes, nor can it use Shell Game. If the shell is destroyed, the graveshell's AC is reduced to 16. As long as a graveshell is alive, its shell naturally repairs itself after a week.

items.name: Corpse Disguise
items.description: The graveshell conceals its true nature over the course of a few minutes by impaling a corpse (typically humanoid) on its spiky shell before partially submerging itself in water. It has an automatic result of 22 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a corpse floating in the water.

items.name: Блок панцирем
items.description:
Триггер: The graveshell takes damage from a physical attack while withdrawn into its shell

Эффект: The graveshell reduces the damage from the attack by an amount equal to its shell's Hardness. A graveshell's shell has a Hardness of 6, 10 Hit Points, and a Broken Threshold of 5. If its shell is broken, the graveshell can't attack with shell spikes, nor can it use Shell Game. If the shell is destroyed, the graveshell's AC is reduced to 16. As long as a graveshell is alive, its shell naturally repairs itself after a week.

items.name: Глубокий вдох
items.description: The graveshell can hold its breath for 200 rounds (20 minutes).

items.name: Shell Game
items.description: The graveshell withdraws into its shell, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and allowing it to use Shell Block. This lasts until the graveshell moves or attacks with any attack other than its shell spikes. The graveshell can't take this action or get any benefit from it if its shell is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3].

Grippli Archer.name: Grippli Archer
Grippli Archer.description:
Frog-like humanoids who make their homes in the treetops of tropical jungles and forests, gripplis are uniquely adapted to their environment. Their oversized eyes give them keen vision in both light and dark, and their large toes allow them to easily scale the trees atop which they reside. Gripplis vary widely in physical appearance, their physiologies largely determined by their surrounding environment; those who live in verdant forests, for example, typically have bright green skin and red eyes. In contrast, gripplis who live in regions of rot and decay have mottled brown coloration, and those who dwell near lakes or streams may bear bright blue and orange stripes. Typical gripplis are just over 2 feet tall and weigh approximately 30 pounds.

Whatever region they come from, gripplis tend to be peaceful hunter-gatherers. Due to their modest understanding of agriculture, gripplis don't raise crops in the traditional sense, although they do cultivate mushroom patches and gather a wide array of fruits from the surrounding wilderness. The jungle also contains rivers and lakes filled with silver-scaled fish, which gripplis harvest in a sustainable manner to ensure their future supply, as well as fatty insects that grow much larger than in other parts of the world. Some of the most advanced grippli societies capture and breed these insects, nurturing herds of giant dragonflies or beetles that are eventually slaughtered for food for the rest of the village. Particularly enterprising gripplis even seek out and tame huge flying insects to use as mounts during their hunts. The rearing of such massive insects is no easy feat, however, so gripplis who manage to do so are often heralded as local heroes.

The treetop settlements of the grippli are difficult to spot from the forest floor. Gripplis obscure their holdings with broad leaves and thick branches, and they riddle the surrounding forest with labyrinthine trails that only they know how to navigate. Their villages are usually constructed among the densest populations of trees, with thin rope bridges strung between wide wooden platforms built around each trunk.

These sharpshooters are renowned for their patience and their accuracy.

items.name: Hail of Arrows
items.description: The grippli archer makes three ranged Strikes with their shortbow, all against a single target. Combine the damage of any Strikes that hit for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

items.name: Джунглевая поступь
items.description: A grippli ignores difficult terrain in forests and jungles.

Grippli Greenspeaker.description:

The unofficial healers of gripplikind are known as greenspeakers.

items.name: Эмпатия растений
items.description: The greenspeaker can use Diplomacy to [[/act make-an-impression]] on and make very simple [[/act request]]{Requests} of plants and fungi.

items.name: Джунглевая поступь
items.description: A grippli ignores difficult terrain in forests and jungles.

Hellcrown.name: Hellcrown
Hellcrown.description:
The life of a Hellknight is bloody, brutal, and often short. Many who perish in service to a Hellknight order are glad to rest after having served their masters so faithfully, but others seek to continue their work even in death. When a Hellknight is decapitated, the ghostly undead known as a hellcrown is an occasional result. Consumed by the desire to bring about order by inflicting cruelty, hellcrowns haunt battlefields and abandoned castles, slaying all they encounter. A strange fusion of spirit and steel, a hellcrown has no corporeal form by itself, but instead inhabits the helmet it so proudly wore in life. Dangling from the helmet like a shroud is a shadow of the former Hellknight's spine, adding to the creature's terrifyingly gruesome appearance. Hellknights regard hellcrowns with a mixture of disgust and respect, considering the individuals who transform into these floating undead to have been resolute in purpose but weak in body.

A hellcrown usually manifests hours or longer after its body's death, and only when its body is unattended; this might even take days if the Hellknight perished in a major battle. Typically, no recognizable fragment of the Hellknight's former personality survives the grisly transformation into a hellcrown, but in rare and particularly tragic cases a hellcrown might remember its life and hold grudges against those it views as the cause of its death. Regardless of whether they retain memories of their lives or have lost all former sense of self, hellcrowns linger around the site of their death, reminding all they encounter of the merciless principles of their order.

items.name: Bleeding Nail
items.description: If the hellcrown hits with a nail Strike, the target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:16] save. On a failure, the nail is embedded in the creature, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute and giving it @Damage[1[bleed]] damage (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and @Damage[1d4[bleed]] on a critical failure). Each additional embedded nail increases the enfeebled value by 1 (to a maximum of enfeebled 4) and the bleed damage by 1. A creature can remove a nail with an Interact action to reduce the enfeeblement and amount of bleed damage. Pulling out the last nail removes both conditions.

items.name: Terrifying Stare
items.description: All creatures that can see the hellcrown and are suffering from its bleeding nail must attempt a @Check[will|dc:16] saving throw. A creature that fails is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, and on a critical failure becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D] for as long as it's frightened. Any creature that attempts a save is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes.

items.name: Сжимать
items.description:
@Damage[(4d8+10)[bludgeoning]], простой спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:41|basic]{Стойкости}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

items.name: Grasping Hands
items.description: The mutant's various hands stretch and reach out in an attempt to grab nearby creatures. The mutant attempts an Athletics check to [[/act grapple]] all creatures within 10 feet. The mutant's multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until it has made all the Athletics checks that are part of its Grasping Hands. Creatures that are grabbed are pulled to a space adjacent to the mutant. This is forced movement.

items.name: Manacles (Average) (Marked with the Symbol of the Scarlet Triad)
items.description:
Вы можете надеть кандалы на кого-то, кто готов или иным образом находится в вашей власти. Надевание кандалов — активность режима исследования занимающая 10–30 секунд, в зависимости от размера существа и количества кандалов, которые вы применяете. Двуногое существо со скованными ногами получает штраф обстоятельства −15 футов к Скоростям, а двурукое существо с закованными запястьями должно преуспеть в @Check[flat|dc:5]{Чистой проверке} каждый раз, когда использует действие @Trait[Manipulate]{воздействия}, иначе это действие проваливается. Этот КС может быть выше, в зависимости от того, как туго кандалы сковывают руки. Существо, прикованное к неподвижному объекту, становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Обездвижено}. Для существ с большим или меньшим количеством конечностей, Мастер определяет, имеют ли кандалы вообще какие-то эффекты.

Освобождение существа из обычных кандалов требует 4 успешные проверки @Check[thievery|dc:27|traits:action:pick-a-lock]{Воровства}.

items.name: Книга заклинаний
items.description: Книга заклинаний содержит записанные знания, необходимые для изучения и подготовки различных заклинаний. Она необходима волшебникам (которые обычно получают её бесплатно) и является полезной роскошью для других заклинателей, желающих выучить дополнительные заклинания. Каждая книга заклинаний может содержать вплоть до 100 заклинаний. Цена указана для пустой книги.

items.name: Инструменты вора [Инструменты взломщика]
items.description:
Вам нужны инструменты вора для @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Вскрытия замков} или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Отключения некоторых устройств}, используя навык Воровства. Инструменты взломщика добавляют бонус предмета +1 к проверкам "Вскрытия замка" или "Отключения устройства".

Если ваши инструменты взломщика поломались, их можно починить заменив отмычки, используя @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{Запасные отмычки}, соответствующие вашему набору; это не требует использования действия Ремонт. Если вы надели свои инструменты вора, то можете доставать и убирать их как часть действия для их использования.

items.name: Timely Distraction
items.description:
Триггер: A creature Heuberk can see within his melee reach misses him with a melee Strike.

Эффект: Heuberk attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X] the creature. If it's not Heuberk's turn and he gets a success, the effect applies on his next turn.

items.name: Identify an Opening
items.description:
Требования: A creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] against Heuberk's next melee attack.

Эффект: Heuberk points out a lapse in the creature's defenses. The creature is off-guard against all melee attacks attempted by any of Heuberk's allies who hear and understand this instruction until the start of Heuberk's next turn.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: Hueberk deals an extra 2d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Wyvern Poison [Applied to 4 Bolts]
items.description:
Правильно собранный и хранимый, яд из жала виверны является очень эффективным и непосредственным.

Активация: 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F] (@Trait[Injury]{ранение})

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:26|name:Яд виверны]

Макс.продолжительность: 6 раундов

Стадия 1: @Damage[5d6[poison]] (1 раунд)

Стадия 2: @Damage[6d6[poison]] (1 раунд)

Стадия 3: @Damage[8d6[poison]] (1 раунд)

items.name: Kobold Explosives
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 batch of infused reagents.

Эффект: Hezle quickly cobbles together an explosive bomb and lobs it up to 30 feet. All creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:5] take @Damage[5d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect] save).

items.name: Дымное отступление
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 batch of infused reagents.

Требования: Hezle must be adjacent to at least one enemy.

Эффект: Hezle throws a mix of special powders centered on a corner of her space, creating a plume of smoke filling a @Template[burst|distance:5] until the end of her turn that causes her to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]. She then immediately @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneaks}, but must end her movement in a space that's not adjacent to any enemies.

All creatures other than Hezle in the smoke cloud must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:26] save.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо получает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 1}.

Провал: Существо получает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 2}.

Критический провал: Существо испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 3} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлено 1}.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: Hezle deals an extra 2d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Staff Mastery
items.description: Although Hezle does not cast spells, her obsession with fire and long hours of practice allow her to cast spells from her staff of fire as if she had the spells on her spell list and could cast them. She still must expend charges from the staff normally; when she prepares the staff each morning, she is capable of placing 4 charges in the staff.

items.name: Истощить предмет силы
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Требования: Ilgreth hasn't acted yet on this turn

Эффект: Ilgreth can cast one prepared spell he has already cast today without spending a spell slot. He must still Cast the Spell and meet the spell's other requirements.

items.name: Непреодолимая энергия
items.description: If Ilgreth's next action is to Cast a Spell, the spell ignores 20 resistance to acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage.

items.name: Fleshroaster
items.description: Эта 4-футовая цепь покрыта зазубринами и имеет шипы на одном или обоих концах. Некоторые из них имеют металлические обручи, используемые в качестве рукоятей.

items.name: Религиозный символ Дроскара
items.description: Этот кусок дерева или серебра гравирован изображением, представляющим божество. Некоторые сакральные заклинатели, такие как жрецы, могут использовать религиозный символ своего божества как сакральный фокус при использовании некоторых умений и сотворении некоторых заклинаний. Чтобы использовать религиозный символ, его надо держать в одной руке.

items.name: Эффективная поимка
items.description:
Требования: Ilssrah has manacles in hand and is adjacent to a creature.

Эффект: Ilssrah attempts to bind the creature's wrists or ankles with the manacles. If she succeeds at an attack roll with a [[/r 1d20+30 #attack]]{+30} modifier against the target's AC, she applies the manacles.

items.name: Hammer the Chained
items.description:
Ilssrah attempts a melee Strike with Fleshroaster. If she hits, she also draws her light hammer, makes a melee Strike with it against the same target, and immediately returns it to her belt. She then resumes her grip on Fleshroaster. Both Strikes count toward Ilssrah's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until both Strikes have been made. If the hammer Strike hits, it deals damage as normal and the target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:35] save.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Неуклюжим 1} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Одурманенным 1} на 1 раунд.

Провал: The creature is clumsy 1 and stupefied 1 for 1 minute.

Критический провал: The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute.

Immortal Ichor.name: Immortal Ichor
Immortal Ichor.description: An immortal ichor is an intelligent mass of blood from a dead evil deity. The cultists who perform the ritual to create immortal ichor typically seal up the sentient ooze in an underground or remote chamber that blocks its magical abilities, but over time these seals break or weaken, freeing the unholy monster.

items.name: Immortality
items.description: The immortal ichor doesn't age, nor does it need to eat or breathe. It can die only as a result of violence.

items.name: Corrupt Ally
items.description: A creature that fails to save against an immortal ichor's charm spell becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}. The stupefied value reduces by 1 every 24 hours. The first time each day a creature stupefied by the ichor's charm fails to save against another casting of the ichor's charm, the value of the condition increases by [[/r 1d4]]. If the stupefied condition ever equals the creature's Wisdom score, it becomes controlled by the ichor permanently; if it dies, it rises the next round as a zombie (of the GM's choice) under the ichor's control. If the ichor is killed, these zombies are destroyed.

items.name: Dead Spells
items.description: An immortal ichor can cast an initial and advanced domain spell of a domain that belonged to the dead deity from which the ichor arose (the domain spells presented here are from the destruction domain).

items.name: Mental Erosion
items.description: A creature hit by the ichor's pseudopod is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 day unless it succeeds at a @Check[will|dc:35] save.

items.name: Resanguinate
items.description: The immortal ichor draws blood from the pores of living creatures around it. Any living creature within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} that has blood takes @Damage[4d6[untyped]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:drained] save). The immortal ichor regains HP equal to the total damage dealt. A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical failure).

items.name: Acid Flask (Major) [Infused]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 4d6 persistent acid damage, and 4 acid splash damage. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

items.name: Alchemist's Fire (Major) [Infused]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 4d8 fire damage, 4 persistent fire damage, and 4 fire splash damage. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

items.name: Bottled Lightning (Major) [Infused]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Молния в бутылке наполнена летучими реагентами, которые создают взрыв электричества, когда реагируют с воздухом. Она наносит 4d6 урона электричеством и 4 урона электрическими брызгами. При попадании цель становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Застигнутой врасплох} до начала вашего следующего хода. Вы получаете бонус предмета +3 к броскам атаки.

items.name: Frost Vial (Major) [Infused]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Жидкие реагенты внутри этого бутылька быстро поглощают тепло при контакте с воздухом. Вы получаете бонус предмета +3 к броскам атаки. Морозная склянка наносит 4d6 урона холодом и 4 урона холодом от брызг. При попадании цель получает штраф состояния −15 футов к своим Скоростям до конца своего следующего хода.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]

items.name: Набор алхимика
items.description: Этот переносной набор пробирок и химикатов можно использовать для простых алхимических задач.

items.name: Книга формул
items.description:
Contains formulas for all common alchemical items of 19th level or lower.

A formula book holds the formulas necessary to make items other than the common equipment from this chapter; alchemists typically get one for free. Each formula book can hold the formulas for up to 100 different items. Formulas can also appear on parchment sheets, tablets, and almost any other medium; there's no need for you to copy them into a specific book as long as you can keep them on hand to reference them.

items.name: Bestial Mutagen (Major) [Infused]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]

Ваши черты лица превращаются во что-то звериное, и вы набираете мышечную массу, но приобретаете неуклюжую форму.

Преимущество: Вы получаете бонус предмета +4 к проверкам Атлетики и броскам безоружных атак. Вы получаете безоружную атаку когтями с 1d8 рубящего урона и признаком @Trait[Agile]{быстрое} и безоружную атаку челюстями с 1d10 колющего урона. Вы получаете специализацию оружия с когтями и челюстями, или выдающуюся специализацию оружия, если у вас уже есть специализация с этими безоружными атаками.

Недостаток: Вы получаете штраф −1 к КБ и штраф −2 к спасброскам Рефлекса.

Продолжительность: 1 час.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.1ouUo8lLK6H79Rqh]

items.name: Juggernaut Mutagen (Major) [Infused]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]

После выпивания этого мутагена, ваше тело станет плотным и крепким. У вас появляется здоровый румянец, хотя вы становитесь грузным и ненаблюдательным.

Преимущество: Вы получаете бонус предмета +4 к спасброскам Стойкости и 45 временных ОЗ. Всякий раз, когда у вас максимальные ОЗ в течение полной 1 минуты, вы восстанавливаете временные ОЗ. Когда при броске спасброска Стойкости вы получаете успех, он становится критическим успехом, а критический провал — простым провалом.

Недостаток: Вы получаете штраф −2 к спасброскам Воли, проверкам Восприятия и броскам инициативы.

Продолжительность: 1 час.

items.description:
Триггер: Ingnovim damages a creature with a syringe Strike

Эффект: The creature injected with unstable mutagen must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:41] save to resist the injection.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: Цель испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 2}.

Every 24 hours, the target may attempt a new saving throw against this effect; on a critical success, the paralysis ends.

items.name: Mutagenic Adaptation
items.description: Ingnovim's body has adapted to the constant use of his mutagens. He does not suffer the drawback of any bestial mutagens but is still affected normally by other mutagens.

items.name: Быстрый бомбометатель
items.description: Ingnovim draws an alchemical bomb with an Interact action and throws it as a ranged Strike.

items.name: Предсмертная агония
items.description:
When one of Ingnovim's assistants dies, it bursts open in a foul-sounding and smelling explosion of toxic viscera and poisonous vapors. All creatures within a @Template[burst|distance:20] must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:38|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save to resist this blast of poison.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 2}.

Провал: The creature takes @Damage[7d8[poison]|options:area-damage] damage.

Критический провал: The creature takes @Damage[14d8[poison],2d8[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage]{14d8 poison damage and 2d8 persistent poison damage}.

items.name: Возможность для атаки (особая)
items.description:
Inizra can use Attack of Opportunity when a creature within her reach uses a concentrate action, in addition to its normal trigger. She can disrupt triggering concentrate actions, and she disrupts actions on any hit, not just a critical hit.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]

items.name: Безграничные ответные действия
items.description: Inizra gains a reaction at the start of each enemy's turn that she can use only during that turn.

items.name: Зеркальный щит
items.description:
Требования: You have a shield raised.

Триггер: An opponent casting a spell that targets you critically fails a spell attack roll against your AC.

Эффект: You reflect the spell back against the triggering opponent. Make a ranged attack against the triggering creature using your highest proficiency with a ranged weapon. If you can cast spells, you can make a spell attack roll instead. If you succeed, your opponent takes the effects of a successful spell attack roll for their own spell (or the effects of a critical success if your attack roll was a critical success).

items.name: Paragon's Guard Stance
items.description: Inizra always has her shield raised as if she had used the Raise a Shield action, as long as she meets that action's requirements.

items.name: Оружейное превосходство
items.description: Inizra is permanently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]. She can use her extra action only to Strike.

items.name: Изменение формы
items.description:
Ishti can take on the appearance of a Medium humanoid. This doesn't change her Speed or her attack and damage modifiers with her Strikes, but it does prevent them from using her cursed touch. Ishti has a fixed humanoid form-they cannot adopt a different appearance each time they use this ability, and the appearance resembles that of their upper torso when in their true form.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

items.name: Ласка матриарха
items.description:
Ishti touches a creature, who must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:40] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} if it critically fails).

If the target fails additional saves against this ability, the condition value increases by 1 (or 2 if it critically fails) (to a maximum of stupefied 4). This condition value decreases by 1 every 24 hours.

items.name: Отравленное оружие
items.description: Ishti applies a poison to a piercing or slashing weapon of her choice.

items.name: Quick Dervish Strike
items.description: Ishti makes a dagger attack against each enemy within reach. Each attack counts toward her multiple attack penalty, but the penalty does not increase until after all the attacks. The first enemy she damages is subject to matriarch's caress.

Jaggaki.name: Jaggaki
Jaggaki.allSaves: +1 состояния ко всем спасброскам от позитивных

items.name: +1 Striking Staff of Necromancy (Greater)
items.description:
Этот изогнутый и мрачный на вид посох украшен жуткими мотивами черепов и костей. Когда владеете этим посохом, вы получаете бонус обстоятельства +2 на проверки определения магии некромантии.

Активация: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]

Эффект: Вы тратите количество зарядов из посоха, чтобы сотворить заклинание из его списка.

  • Чары: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mAMEt4FFbdqoRnkN]
  • 1-й: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J7Y7tl0bbdz7TcCc]
  • 2-й: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fZPCv2VHuM2yPbC8], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.xRgU9rrhmGAgG4Rc]
  • 3-й: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VosLNn2M8S7JH67D], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.N1Z1oLPdBxaSgrEE]
  • 4-й: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.N1Z1oLPdBxaSgrEE]

Требования для создания: Предоставить одно сотворение всех указанных рангов всех перечисленных заклинаний.

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам против жизненности
Восстановление
items.description: Когда лич уничтожен, его душа мгновенно переносится в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.NEbr7nKuiluJgBHT]{Клетку души}. Лич может быть уничтожен навсегда только если найдена и уничтожена его клетка души.

items.name: Bones of Stone
items.description:
Требования: The target is standing on or adjacent to a stone surface.

Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: Jaggaki calls upon unquiet spirits within the land, causing a giant skeletal arm made of jagged stone to reach out of a stone surface adjacent to a creature within 60 feet. Jaggaki makes a hand Strike against the target via this stone arm rather than using his own hand. If the Strike hits, it deals @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

items.name: Истощение клетки души
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: Jaggaki taps into his @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.NEbr7nKuiluJgBHT]{Soul Cage's} power to cast any arcane spell up to the highest level he can cast, even if the spell being cast is not one of the lich's prepared spells.

Jaggaki's soul cage doesn't need to be present for him to use this ability.

items.name: Парализующее касание
items.description:
A creature damaged by the Jaggaki's hand Strike must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:29] save.

The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] for 1 round on a failure. On a critical failure, the creature is paralyzed permanently, falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60], and seems dead. A @Check[medicine|dc:25|name:Diagnose Paralysis] check reveals the victim is alive.

items.name: Стойкое колдовство
items.description: If another creature's reaction would disrupt Jaggaki's spellcasting action, Jaggaki attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15] check. If he succeeds, his action isn't disrupted.

items.name: Divine Providence
items.description:
Триггер: Jahsi rolls a success on a Will save against an enemy's effect.

Эффект: Jahsi gets a critical success instead.

0.text: R Trigger Jahsi rolls a success on a Will save against an enemy's effect.

items.name: Проблеск искупления
items.description:
Триггер: An enemy damages one of Jahsi's allies within 15 feet of him.

Эффект: The foe must choose one: The ally is unharmed by the triggering damage, or the ally gains resistance 10 against the triggering damage, and the enemy is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the end of its next turn.

items.name: Лесная поступь
items.description: Jahsi ignores difficult terrain from plants.

Kalavakus.name: Kalavakus
Kalavakus.description: Kalavakuses work as slavers in the Abyss, earning them the alternate moniker of "slaver demons"; these fiends round up captured victims and sell them to other fiends or unscrupulous mortals. Pleas for freedom or clemency fall on deaf ears, as slaver demons consider anyone they can catch and hold to be their rightful property and theirs to sell. Kalavakuses know more than just physical means of restraining slaves; they also know how to fetter a victim's soul. The most successful slaver demons have vast slave-pits in the Abyss where they keep stables of imprisoned souls.
Kalavakus.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Horn Snare
items.description:
Триггер: A creature misses the slaver demon with a melee weapon Strike.

Эффект: The slaver demon attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9] the weapon used in the triggering Strike with a -2 penalty. If it rolls a success, it gets a critical success instead. The demon doesn't need a free hand to use this ability.

items.name: Liberation Vulnerability
items.description: The first time each round that a creature escapes from the slaver demon's Enslave Soul or the slaver demon witnesses a creature being freed from captivity or mental enslavement, the demon takes @Damage[3d6[mental]] damage.

items.name: Enslave Soul
items.description:
The demon enslaves the soul of a living creature within 60 feet. The target can attempt to resist this enslavement with a @Check[will|dc:29] save.

A slaver demon can have only one living soul enslaved with this ability at a time, and no more than one slaver demon can enslave the same soul. If a slaver demon kills a creature whose soul it has enslaved, the demon regains @Damage[20[healing]] HP and the soul is consigned to an eternity of toil in the Abyss, adding to the slaver demon's tally of souls and allowing the demon to enslave another.

Успех: The target avoids being enslaved and is temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Провал: The target is enslaved and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 24 hours or until the slaver demon is slain, whichever comes first.

Критический провал: As failure, and the target also suffers the effects of a failed saving throw against @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OsOhx3TGIZ7AhD0P].

items.name: Sterling Blacksmith's Tools
items.description:
Вам нужны эти инструменты, чтобы создавать предметы из исходных материалов с помощью навыка Ремесло. Безупречные инструменты ремесленника дают бонус предмета +1 к проверке навыка.

На усмотрение Мастера, различные наборы инструментов необходимы для разной работы; например, инструменты кузнеца отличаются от инструментов плотника.

items.name: Master Smith
items.description: As the most skillful blacksmith in Kovlar, Kelda's abilities far surpass those of typical smiths. She can Craft items as if she were 16th level. Additionally, she knows how to make a vast catalog of items, including numerous uncommon formulas and several rare formulas. The exact formulas she knows can be tailored to fit the needs of each particular group of PCs, but most are for weapons, armor, and other items that could reasonably be made in a forge.

King Harral.name: King Harral
King Harral.allSaves: +1 состояния ко всем спасброскам от позитивных

Контрзаклинание
items.description:
Триггер: A creature casts a spell King Harral has prepared.

Эффект: The king expends a prepared spell to counter the triggering creature's casting of that same spell. He can then attempt to dispel the triggering spell.

items.description:

items.name: Восстановление
items.description: 24 hours after King Harral is destroyed, his body rebuilds itself on his throne (or, if the throne is destroyed, on the site where the throne once sat), similarly to how a lich's body is restored via its phylactery. If all of Saggorak's buildings are destroyed, or if heroes perform a great service in saving Saggorak, King Harral loses this ability.

items.name: Стойкое колдовство
items.description: If another creature's reaction would disrupt King Harral's spell, he attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. If he succeeds, the spell isn't disrupted.

items.name: Intimidating Attack of Opportunity
items.description:
Kralgurn's Attacks of Opportunity not only wound creatures, but also shatter their confidence. If Kralgurn hits and deals damage with an Attack of Opportunity, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4} on a critical hit.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]

items.name: Страшный громила
items.description: When Kralgurn attacks a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL] creature, he gains a circumstance bonus to damage equal to three times the target's frightened value.

items.name: Ring of Fire Resistance
items.description: This ring grants you resistance 5 against fire.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]

items.name: Archery Experience
items.description: Laslunn doesn't take the penalty from the volley trait, and her ranged Strikes don't trigger reactions.

items.name: Рявкнуть приказ
items.description: Laslunn issues a command to reposition her allies. Allies who hear and understand this order can use a reaction to Step.

items.name: Эффективная поимка
items.description:
Требования: Laslunn has manacles in hand and is adjacent to a creature.

Эффект: Laslunn attempts to bind the creature's wrists or ankles with the manacles. If she succeeds at an attack roll with a [[/r 1d20+28 #Manacles]]{+28} modifier against the target's AC, she applies the manacles to the creature's wrists or legs.

items.name: Суровое путешествие
items.description: Laslunn ignores the first square of difficult terrain she moves into each time she Steps or Strides.

items.name: Superior Pack Attack
items.description: Laslunn deals an extra 2d8 damage to any creature that's within reach of at least one of her allies.

items.name: Twin Shot
items.description: Laslunn makes two Strikes with her bow using her current multiple attack penalty. If both attacks hit the same creature, combine the damage and apply resistances and weaknesses only once. This counts as two attacks when calculating Laslunn's multiple attack penalty.

items.name: Антимагия голема
items.description:
Повреждается от @Trait[Cold]{холода} и @Trait[Vitality]{жизненности} (@Damage[5d10[untyped]], @Damage[2d8[untyped]] от областей или продолжительного урона); исцеляется от @Trait[Void]{пустоты} (область @Damage[2d8[healing]]); замедляется от @Trait[Earth]{земли}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.GolemAntimagic]

items.name: Necrotic Field
items.description:
30 feet. Vitality energy effects within the golem's necrotic field deal only half their normal damage. Additionally, all undead within its aura deal an additional @Damage[1d6[void]] damage with their natural attacks.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.kjP0J97hhoIhbF3M]

items.name: Уязвим к камню в плоть
items.description: A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pr1ruNTbzGn3H9w5] spell negates the golem's antimagic and its resistance to physical damage for 1 round. A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA] spell reverses this effect immediately.

items.name: Неумолимое шествие
items.description: The golem Strides up to its Speed, pushing back each creature whose space it moves into and damaging them if they try to stop its movement. A creature can bar the way by succeeding at a @Check[fortitude|dc:36] save. On a critical success, the resisting creature takes no damage; otherwise, it takes damage equal to that dealt by the golem's fist Strike

items.name: Necrotic Affliction
items.description:
Триггер: The golem hits a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3] creature.

Эффект: The creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:34] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical failure) as the golem's lazurite leeches vital energies and causes wounds to rot.

items.name: Necrotic Pulse
items.description: Each creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:10] must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:32|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save or take @Damage[1d6[persistent,void]|options:area-damage] damage and be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute as their flesh and bones temporarily atrophy. The golem can't use Necrotic Pulse again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Necrotic Pulse]]{1d4 rounds}.

Lesser Dragonstorm.name: Lesser Dragonstorm
Lesser Dragonstorm.descriptionHazard: A small-scale version of a dragonstorm-a churning vortex of wind infused with fire, acid, lightning, poison, and ice-fills Alseta's Ring.
Lesser Dragonstorm.disable: @Check[religion|dc:40|name:Call for Divine Intervention] (legendary) to call out to a non-evil deity for direct intervention to disperse the lesser dragonstorm (prayers to Apsu allow characters who are masters in Religion to attempt the check as if they were legendary instead), @Check[thievery|dc:42|name:Deactivate Vengegate|traits:action:disable-a-device] (legendary) to deactivate Vengegate while the manifestation is forcing it open, or a successful @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (10th rank; DC 40) to counteract the lesser dragonstorm.
Lesser Dragonstorm.routine: (1 action) On its initiative, the lesser dragonstorm reaches out and blasts all creatures within Alseta's Ring. Affected creatures take @Damage[2d8[acid],2d8[cold],2d8[electricity],2d8[fire],2d8[poison]|options:area-damage]{10d8 damage} (@Check[reflex|dc:46|basic|options:area-effect,forced-movement,inflicts:prone]), evenly split between acid, cold, fire, electricity, and poison. Creatures that fail their save are pulled 20 feet toward the center of Alseta's Ring (or are knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60] and pulled 30 feet on a critical failure). After 10 rounds, the lesser dragonstorm is destroyed, but a much greater dragonstorm manifests in the surrounding region-see The Dragonstorm.

items.name: Manifest Lesser Dragonstorm
items.description:
Триггер: A creature attempts to activate Vengegate

Эффект: The chamber within Alseta's Ring fills with a dragonstorm. Creatures within this area take @Damage[2d8[acid],2d8[cold],2d8[electricity],2d8[fire],2d8[poison]|options:area-damage]{10d8 damage}, equally split between acid, cold, electricity, fire, and poison.

Lesser Manifestation Of Dahak.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.description: Дым не ограничивает зрение красного дракона; он игнорирует состояние @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Сокрытия} от дыма.

items.name: Перенаправить энергию
items.description:
Триггер: A creature within 100 feet casts an acid, cold, fire, electricity, or poison spell, or such a spell otherwise comes into effect from a source within 100 feet

Эффект: The manifestation of Dahak makes all the choices to determine the targets, destination, or other effects of the spell, as though it were the caster.

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description:
The manifestation of Dahak breathes a blast of dragonstorm energy that deals @Damage[5d6[acid],5d6[cold],5d6[electricity],5d6[fire],5d6[poison]|options:area-damage]{5d6 acid, 5d6 cold, 5d6 electricity, 5d6 fire, and 5d6 poison damage} in a @Template[cone|distance:60] (@Check[reflex|dc:46|basic|name:Dragonstorm Breath|traits:fire,acid,cold,electricity,poison|options:area-effect] save).

It can't use Dragonstorm Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Dragonstorm Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Драконье неистовство
items.description: Дракон в любом порядке наносит 2 "Удара" когтями и 1 "Удар" крылом.

items.name: Драконий импульс
items.description: Когда дракон критически попадает "Ударом", он перезаряжает свою "Атаку дыханием".

items.name: Manipulate Energy
items.description: The manifestation attempts to take control of a magical acid, cold, electricity, fire, or poison spell within 100 feet. If it succeeds at a counteract check (counteract rank 10, counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+36 #Manipulate Energy]]{+36}), the original caster loses control of the spell, control is transferred to the manifestation, and the manifestation counts as having Sustained the Spell with this action (if applicable). The manifestation can end the spell instead of taking control, if it chooses.

Living Sap.name: Living Sap
Living Sap.description:
The tall sharinga trees of the Mwangi Expanse leak golden sap from their swollen, bulbous trunks, which coagulates when exposed to air. The toxic resin, which has a bitter taste, protects the tree from herbivorous insects and other animals, but in rare cases-usually in areas awash in vitality energy or the influence of the First World-the sap gains a life of its own. Such "living sap" is a mindless ooze that attempts to smother and engulf just about anything that moves, from the bugs and small beasts that feed on its sharinga tree to larger creatures unlucky enough to stumble upon it. Due to its immunities to most forms of physical damage and its protectiveness of its mother tree, a living ooze is a nuisance to communities that rely on the sap of sharinga trees to make resin, rubber, and glue.

Jungle-dwelling alchemists such as gripplis cherish the sap of the sharinga tree for its unique adhesive properties. The sap has been used for centuries to create tanglefoot bags, glue, and hard resin. Residue collected from a living sap is even more fascinating from an alchemical standpoint. Though harvesting a living sap is very dangerous, some alchemists will risk death in order to procure these easily worked ingredients. To increase the odds of a successful harvest, such employers are often willing to supply offensive aids such as lesser frost vials; living sap hunters learned long ago that cold energy is effective against these creatures and luckily doesn't harm the harvestable reagents.

A creature that hits a living sap with an unarmed attack must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:24] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] by the living sap until the end of its next turn.

Precentor.name: Precentor
Precentor.description:
Velstracs are horrific, shadow-dwelling fiends who seek ultimate sensation through self-mutilation. They transcend their stoic detachment only when inflicting pain and terror upon their victims, practicing new forms of debasement and torture before then turning their knives on themselves. Although velstracs consider themselves beyond such limitations as morality or mortal taboos, their victims know them as emotionless tormentors who inflict debased, sadistic suffering. They claim to seek perfection in thought, form, and action, although they don't recognize any refinement that doesn't require the painful excision of the flesh or spirit.

Velstracs manifest from the souls of masochistic or sadistic mortals that are diverted into the Shadow Plane and then forged into forms that suit their vile predilections, ranging from the low-ranking augurs to the aesthetics-obsessed interlocutors.

Some mortals refer to velstracs as "kytons," a misattribution that the velstracs tolerate with cold amusement. The term "kyton" denotes a master or virtuoso among their kind, and these fiends enjoy being labeled masters of their horrid paths to perfection through agony.

Velstrac storytellers and historians are known as precentors. Trailed by horrific choirs, precentors perform in the courts of the velstrac demagogues.
Precentor.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

A precentor can have any number of creatures in its choir, although a creature no longer affected by Tormenting Touch leaves the choir immediately. Creatures in a precentor's choir of screams are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg] by each other and the precentor, and they can't use hostile actions toward each other or the precentor. When the precentor casts an innate divine spell, it can cause the effect to originate from any member of its choir instead of itself, using the precentor's saving throw DC and attack bonus.

items.name: Сосредоточить взгляд
items.description:
The precentor stares at a creature it can see within 30 feet. The target must immediately attempt a @Check[will|dc:38|options:inflicts:doomed,inflicts:confused] save against the precentor's unnerving gaze.

In addition, if the creature was already @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv], on a failed save, it sees the skin of its own body peel back, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ] for as long as it remains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]. After attempting this save, the creature is then temporarily immune until the start of the precentor's next turn.

items.name: Tormenting Touch
items.description:
The precentor touches a creature within 10 feet, causing it to constantly scream in agony. The target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:38] save.

While the target is stupefied by this effect, its continual screams cause it to automatically fail Stealth checks.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}.

Провал: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3}.

Критический провал: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}.

The target can attempt a new Will save at the start of each of its turns, reducing the stupefied condition by 1 on each successful save. If the target reduces its stupefied condition to 0 in this way, the target is no longer affected.

If the Strike hits, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] until the start of the guard's next turn, and the guard can automatically Shove the target, with the same benefits as the Shove action (including the critical success effect if the Strike was a critical hit). If the guard moves to follow the target, this movement doesn't trigger reactions. In addition, if the target has to stop moving because it would hit an object, it takes damage equal to the guard's Strength modifier.

Quarry Sluiceway.name: Quarry Sluiceway
Quarry Sluiceway.descriptionHazard: Six sluice gates open to allow thousands of gallons of water to begin flooding the room. The water churns through the room and flows out through three chutes on the south end of the room.
Quarry Sluiceway.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:28|name:Close a Sluice|traits:complex,mechanical,trap,hazard] (expert) twice to close a sluice (on a critical success, a sluice is closed immediately)
Quarry Sluiceway.reset: The trap resets if all six sluices are closed. If all the water has drained when this occurs, the water takes many months to refill.
Quarry Sluiceway.routine:
(6 actions) The trap loses 1 action per disabled or destroyed sluice. On each of its actions, the water rushing from the sluices flows through the room, creating a river of churning water that fills the room to several inches and makes the floor of the chamber into difficult terrain. The water level never rises above this level in the room, as it drains out of the chutes to the south and begins to flood the quarry pit (area J2). On the trap's second turn, the water starts filling the four slave pits in area J2. Each of the trap's actions fills the pits 4 inches (2 feet per round if all sluices are functional). If the slave pits fill to their total depth of 12 feet and the grates over the slave pits aren't open, the slaves begin to drown, dying if they aren't freed in 5 rounds. Once the slave pits are full, the water continues to slowly fill the central area over the course of an hour until it empties the reservoir and floods area J2 to a depth of 15 feet.

Other options beyond disabling or destroying the sluices could prevent the flooding of the quarry pit at your discretion.
Quarry Sluiceway.stealth: (expert) or @Check[perception|dc:27|name:Notice Sluice Gates|traits:complex,mechanical,trap,hazard] (expert) to notice the six cleverly hidden sluice gates while they are closed

Remnant of Barzillai.name: Remnant of Barzillai
Remnant of Barzillai.description:
Though the Silver Ravens defeated the evil tyrant Barzillai Thrune before he could fully realize his goal of becoming a genius loci, remnants of his spirit remain throughout the Ravounel region. On occasion, these scraps of sentience form a vague, Barzillai-shaped body from bits of the nearby terrain, but when near haunted locations, the spectral force can coalesce into a more precise body using ectoplasm siphoned from these haunts. In either form, the remnant carries a form of Barzillai's own burning mace, which dissolves into a thin mist 1 hour after the remnant is destroyed.

Remnants of Barzillai can manifest anywhere throughout Ravounel, and even after one remnant is defeated, another might arise later on. The undead inquisitor can be put to rest permanently only by retrieving his mace before it disappears, then burying it in a location consecrated by good clerics, where it must remain for at least a year undisturbed.

While a remnant of Barzillai can draw power from any haunt it is associated with, remnants tend to do so with specific haunts. The haunts presented are commonly associated with remnants of Barzillai. These are far from the only haunts Barzillai can create, however; the Silver Ravens' records mention many phenomena associated with the undead being, some of which deal with themes of various birds, the scents of mint and tea, and ghostly figures in heavy armor.

items.name: Haunted Form
items.description: The remnant of Barzillai draws on the power of haunts, reinforcing his form when they are nearby. His resistance to all damage increases to 12 while he's within 60 feet of a haunt. When a haunt within 60 feet of Barzillai is disabled, he takes @Damage[20[force]] damage from the backlash.

items.name: Create Haunt
items.description:
Частота: 3 раза в день

Требования: The remnant of Barzillai is within Ravounel.

Эффект: The remnant of Barzillai stirs up and amplifies unsettled spirits in the area to create a single haunt of 6th level or lower at his present location. This haunt is permanent until it is disabled or the remnant of Barzillai is destroyed.

items.description:
Вы можете надеть кандалы на кого-то, кто готов или иным образом находится в вашей власти. Надевание кандалов — активность режима исследования занимающая 10–30 секунд, в зависимости от размера существа и количества кандалов, которые вы применяете. Существо, прикованное к неподвижному объекту, становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Обездвижено}. items.name: Brutal Cleave
items.description:
Триггер: The bruiser's melee Strike kills a creature or knocks it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf], and another foe is adjacent to that creature.

Эффект: The bruiser makes another melee Strike against the second foe at the same multiple attack penalty as the triggering Strike.

items.name: Эффективная поимка
items.description:
Требования: The bruiser has manacles in hand and is adjacent to a creature.

Эффект: The bruiser attempts to bind the creature's wrists or ankles with the manacles. They must succeed at an attack roll with a [[/r 1d20+23 #Manacles]]{+23} modifier against the target's AC.

items.name: Pummeling Flurry
items.description:
