Эффект: The bruiser makes a greatclub Strike and a kick Strike. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purposes of resistances and weaknesses.

items.name: Stunning Retort
items.description:
Триггер: An enemy critically fails a Strike against the enforcer

Эффект: The enforcer Strikes with their sap against that enemy if they're within reach; otherwise, the enforcer attempts an Intimidation check to [[/act demoralize]] that enemy.

items.name: Dual Abuse
items.description:
The enforcer uses the pain of one attack as an opening to deal a devastating second blow. The enforcer makes two attacks against the same target: a scimitar Strike and sap Strike (in any order) or two composite shortbow Strikes. If both attacks hit, the second attack deals an additional 3d6 damage, and the enforcer gives the target one of the following conditions until the end of the enforcer's next turn: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

This counts as two attacks when calculating the enforcer's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after both attacks.

items.name: Эффективная поимка
items.description:
Требования: The enforcer has manacles in hand and is adjacent to a creature

Эффект: The enforcer attempts to bind the creature's wrists or ankles with the manacles. If the enforcer succeeds at an attack roll with a [[/r 1d20+30 #Manacles]]{+30 modifier} against the target's AC, they apply the manacles.

Вам нужны инструменты вора для @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Вскрытия замков} или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Отключения некоторых устройств}, используя навык Воровства.

items.name: Bloodseeker Beak (Affixed to Rapier)
items.description:
This long, hollow proboscis is harvested from the notorious bloodseeker beast and drips a trickle of blood.

Активация: F вообразить

Триггер: Вы попали по @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Застигнутому врасплох} существу с помощью прикреплённого оружия

When you activate the beak, you deal an extra 1d4 precision damage on your damage roll. If you deal sneak attack damage to the creature, you also deal @Damage[1d4[bleed]].

items.name: Лишить преимущества
items.description: The sneak isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf], or flanking creatures of 6th level or lower, or creatures of 6th level or lower using surprise attack.

Триггер: The sneak is hit by an attack made by a creature the sneak can see.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: The scarlet triad sneak deals an extra 2d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Неожиданная атака
items.description: In the first round of combat, creatures that haven't acted yet are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to the sneak.

items.name: Backshot
items.description:
Триггер: A creature the sniper can see misses it with a ranged weapon Strike.

Эффект: The sniper attempts a ranged Strike against the triggering creature with a -2 penalty.

items.name: Дождь стрел
items.description: The sniper fires one arrow at each creature they choose within a @Template[burst|distance:15]. The center of the burst must be within 100 feet of the sniper, but can't be within 30 feet. The sniper makes each attack roll separately. All attacks count toward the sniper's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty increases only after all the attacks are made.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: The scarlet triad sniper deals an additional 2d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Стремительность
items.description: The sniper's movement doesn't trigger reactions.

items.description: When forced to move 10 feet or more, the thug is moved only half the distance.

items.name: Cataclysmic Rain
items.description:
Триггер: A creature enters the marked area

Эффект: Fiery spears make one Strike against each living creature within 5 feet of the marked area.

items.name: Personal Quake
items.description: A creature struck by a seismic spear is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} for 1 round as their body shakes uncontrollably. On a critical hit, a target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:39] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg] for 1 minute, or permanently on a critical failure.

items.name: Seismic Spear
items.description: No MAP applies to strikes made by seismic spear attacks

items.name: Нет ШМА
items.description: The Seismic Spear Strikes do not apply a MAP.

items.name: Command Skeletons
items.description: The skeletal Hellknight can direct the actions of the nearby skeleton guards, commanding them to perform tactics such as flanking foes and focusing their attacks on specific targets. As long as the skeletal Hellknight is active and commanding the skeletons, they gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.hFtNbo1LKYCoDy2O] reaction.

items.name: Invoke Reckoning
items.description:
Триггер: The skeletal Hellknight hits a foe with a Strike.

Эффект: The skeletal Hellknight causes the creature struck to endure the pain of an Order of the Nail's reckoning-a rite of mortification Hellknights of that order use to focus their minds. The creature struck feels as if nails are being driven into their body, and must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:17|options:damaging-effect,inflicts:stunned] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} from the pain. On a critical failure, the pain manifests as actual puncture wounds, dealing an additional @Damage[2d6[piercing]] damage to the victim.

Soulbound Ruin.name: Soulbound Ruin
Soulbound Ruin.description: Those who tread in ruined places sometimes speak of a sense that a supernatural presence is there alongside them, as if the spirits of the dead were watching intently. Such presences can be very real, often taking the form of ghosts or other shades of undead that cannot let go of their attachment to the Material Plane. But sometimes, instead of manifesting as distinct spirits, the souls of the dead infuse the very stone and mortar around them. When enough souls attach themselves to a single place-be it a home, crypt, or castle-it can take on a life of its own, becoming a soulbound ruin.
Soulbound Ruin.language: other languages typical to the region

items.name: Мешать
items.description:
Частота: Раз в ход

Триггер: A creature within the soulbound ruin uses an action with the move trait.

Эффект: The soulbound ruin reacts violently to stop the creature's movement, shooting spikes, throwing bricks, or otherwise impeding the target. The target must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:35] save or fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60].

items.name: Vulnerability to Exorcism
items.description: When a soulbound ruin fails a saving throw against a spell that would banish tormented spirits or manipulate souls, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.bay4AfSu2iIozNNW] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYmXvS9NJ7QwfWGg], instead of experiencing the listed effects, it takes @Damage[10[untyped]] damage per spell rank.

items.name: Collapse Ceiling
items.description:
The ruin collapses up to three @Template[square|distance:10]{10-foot by 10-foot} sections of its ceiling. The ruin takes @Damage[10[untyped]] damage per section it collapses, and it can't collapse the same section until it has been repaired.

Each creature in one of these areas takes @Damage[8d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:35|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:restrained] save. On a failed save, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM] under the rubble until it [[/act escape dc=33]]{Escapes}.

items.name: Pervasive Attacks
items.description: A soulbound ruin's edifice Strikes can target any creature inside the ruin.

items.name: Саморемонт
items.description:
The ruin can spend 10 minutes repairing itself to regain up to @Damage[30[healing]] Hit Points. If the ruin is interrupted during this time, it loses its focus and the repair fails.

This ability functions even if the ruin is reduced to 0 HP, unless a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dbd5W6G8U2vzWolN] ritual has been performed to purify the building, in which case the soulbound ruin is destroyed. This ritual must be dedicated to a good deity or a deity with a strong opposition to undead, such as Pharasma.

items.name: Взмах хвостом
items.description:
Триггер: A creature within reach of the spawn's tail uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

Эффект: The spawn of Dahak makes a tail Strike at the creature with a -2 penalty. If it hits, they disrupt the creature's action.

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description:
The spawn breathes flames that deals @Damage[9d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect] save).

They can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}

items.name: Драконье неистовство
items.description: The spawn makes two claw Strikes and one bite Strike in any order.

items.name: Shrieking Frenzy
items.description:
Триггер: The spawn's turn begins.

Частота: Раз в час

Эффект: The spawn is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl] until the end of their turn, and can use the extra action to Stride or Strike. While in the frenzy, the spawn can't speak and automatically critically fails Stealth checks, due to their loud wailing.

items.name: Thrown Weapon Mastery
items.description: When the spawn throws a weapon, the weapon gains the deadly d6 weapon trait. When they throw an improvised weapon, they don't take the -2 penalty for using an improvised weapon, nor do they take the penalty for using that weapon to make a lethal attack instead of a nonlethal attack.

Spiked Doorframe.name: Spiked Doorframe
Spiked Doorframe.descriptionHazard: Spikes lance out of the doorframe to skewer anyone who attempts to open the door.
Spiked Doorframe.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:20|name:Deactivate Trigger|traits:hazard,mechanical,trap,action:disable-a-device] (trained) to deactivate a trigger built into the door's handle

items.name: Шипы
items.description:
Триггер: The door is opened.

Эффект: The trap makes an attack against the creature that opened the door.

Spiritbound Aluum.name: Spiritbound Aluum
Spiritbound Aluum.description:
Whereas most aluums are animated by the souls of volunteers loyal to Katapesh, the Pactmasters created a handful of more capable (and deadly) aluums powered by the souls of a dozen or more dangerous criminals. These spiritbound aluums are rarely used as peacekeepers, instead serving as assassins, elite bodyguards, or riot control during times of martial law.

A spiritbound aluum has a dull blue crystalline focus that stores constituent souls, surrounded by a host of smaller gems used for trapping souls the Pactmasters wish to deny from entering the Great Beyond. Spiritbound aluums rarely use this soul-binding ability except when instructed by their masters. However, the murderous or embittered souls within the aluum sometimes exert control and willfully consume a departing soul either out of malice or to incorporate it into the construct's core. If not relieved of its trapped souls in a timely manner, a spiritbound aluum can develop enough will to overcome its masters' orders and even awaken to full sentience. These rogue aluums typically lose the mindless trait, are evil, have an Intelligence modifier of -2 or higher, and gain several skills with bonuses ranging from +25 to +32.

Aluums are powerful metal and stone constructs originally created by the Pactmasters to maintain order in Katapesh. The construction of each aluum includes the creation of an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bU731I8njNmSAQhQ], a brass pendant set with a blue crystal designed to control that particular construct. The charm constructed at the same time as an aluum is called its linked charm.

items.name: Aluum Antimagic
items.description: Spiritbound aluums are immune to spells and magical abilities, with two exceptions. A void spell or magical ability grants a spiritbound aluum the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl] condition until the end of its next turn instead of its normal effects. A vitality spell or ability makes a spiritbound aluum @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of its next turn instead of its normal effects.

items.name: Obliteration Beam
items.description:
Требования: The spiritbound aluum has bound a soul using its @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYmXvS9NJ7QwfWGg] innate spell

Эффект: The spiritbound aluum transforms the captured soul's essence into raw magical energy, channeling the spirit into a beam that deals @Damage[20d6[force]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[line|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic|options:area-effect] save). The remaining fragments of the captured soul are released to the Great Beyond.

The spiritbound aluum can't use Obliteration Beam again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Obliteration Beam]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Paralyzing Force
items.description: A creature damaged by the Spiritbound Aluum's fist Strike must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:35] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] for 1 round. On a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] for [[/gmr 1d4 #minutes]]{1d4 minutes} and falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60].

items.name: Soul Binder
items.description:
When a spiritbound aluum uses its @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYmXvS9NJ7QwfWGg] innate spell, it binds the soul into its central crystal instead of the normal material component. The crystal can hold up to 60 souls.

When encountered, a spiritbound aluum's crystal typically contains [[/gmr 1d6 #souls]]{1d6 souls}.

items.name: Soul Shriek
items.description:
The aluum enforcer emits a keening wail in a @Template[cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[16d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:27|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stunned] save). A creature that fails its save is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} on a critical failure.

The aluum can't use Soul Shriek again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Soul Shriek]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Site Bound (Jewelgate Way Station)
items.description:
Jewelgate Way Station

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

items.name: Восстановление
items.description:
Talamira's ghost is bound to the way station by the presence of the wailing crystals; if this hazard is deactivated or destroyed, Talamira sighs in relief as her memories are restored-this burst of psychic energy suffuses all PCs in the area, granting them access to the ancient tradition of magic she once followed, that of the crystal keeper archetype. A moment later, Talamira fades away, her soul moving on to the afterlife.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

items.name: Resonant Wail
items.description:
Talamira releases an anguish-filled cry of despair. All creatures within 30 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:33] save to resist.

Talamira can't use Resonant Wail for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Resonant Wail]]{1d4 rounds}.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: The creature wails with anguish for 3 rounds. The shrieks resonate within the room's wailing crystals, giving the crystals a +2 status bonus on attack rolls against that creature during this time.

Провал: As success, but the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute as it sobs uncontrollably. If the creature is already slowed 1 by crushing despair, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} as long as it's under both effects simultaneously.

Критический провал: As failure, but the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} from its overwhelming sadness.

items.name: Telekinetic Crystalline Assault
items.description: Talamira fills the air with whirling crystals, dealing @Damage[7d6[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect] save).

Tarrasque, The Armageddon Engine.name: Tarrasque, The Armageddon Engine
Tarrasque, The Armageddon Engine.description:
The most powerful spawn is Tarrasque, whose legend spread across countless worlds beyond Golarion. Its destruction of the nation of Ninshabur and its march across Avistan in -632 AR culminated in the destruction of the flying Shory city of Kho before this spawn was sealed away in a remote cavern.

The spawn are titanic terrors of immense size and strength that live only to destroy. Tarrasque and Xotani are but two of Rovagug's spawn. Others, including Chemnosit (the Monarch Worm), Kothogaz (the Dance of Disharmony), and Volnagur (the End-Singer) hold places of horror in the history of various regions, but the most famed is Ulunat (the Unholy First), whose beetle-like carcass remains sprawled in Sothis, the capital of Osirion.
Tarrasque, The Armageddon Engine.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)
Tarrasque, The Armageddon Engine.allSaves: бонус состояния +2 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Бонус состояния +2 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Панцирь
items.description: Tarrasque is immune to cones, lines, rays, and magic missile spells. These effects bounce harmlessly off its scales.

items.name: Устрашающее присутствие
items.description:
300 футов. Спасбросок @Check[will|dc:39|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened]{Воли}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

items.name: Непоколебимость
items.description: Tarrasque recovers from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix] conditions at the end of its turn. It's also immune to penalties to its Speeds, and it ignores difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain.

items.name: Реагирующий
items.description: Тарраск получает 3 реакции каждый раунд. Он по-прежнему может использовать только одну реакцию на триггер.

items.name: Reflect
items.description:
Триггер: Tarrasque's carapace deflects an effect.

Эффект: The effect is redirected back at its source.

items.name: Разрушительное бешенство
items.description: Tarrasque makes a jaws Strike, two claw Strikes, two horn Strikes, and one tail Strike in any order.

items.name: Быстрое проглатывание
items.description:
Триггер: Tarrasque Grabs a creature with its jaws

Эффект: Tarrasque uses Swallow Whole.

items.name: Spine Volley
items.description:
Tarrasque flings spines in a @Template[cone|distance:120], dealing @Damage[(3d10+20)[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in the area (@Check[reflex|dc:53|basic|options:area-effect] save).

Tarrasque can't use Spine Volley again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Spine Volley]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Проглотить целиком
items.description:
Huge, @Damage[(10d6+12)[bludgeoning],10d6[acid]], Rupture 50

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

items.name: Растоптать
items.description:
Huge or smaller, claw, @Check[reflex|dc:49|basic] save. When Tarrasque Tramples, it can Stride up to triple its Speed.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

Teyam Ishtori.name: Teyam Ishtori
Teyam Ishtori.description:
Демиличи образуются, когда лич, по неосторожности или случайно, теряет клетку души. Проходят годы, тело лича рассыпается в прах, оставляя лишь череп как вместилище его некромантической силы. Лич впадает в некое оцепенение, а его разум остаётся бродить по планам в поисках все более великих тайн. Лич постепенно теряет способность творить заклинания, а его магические предметы постепенно принимают новую форму. Негативная энергия концентрируется вокруг черепа, заставляя некоторые его кости и зубы каменеть от силы и превращаться в губительные кристаллы. Получающийся в результате череп лича, усыпанный арканными самоцветами и наполненный ощутимой мощной магией, формирует существо, называемое демиличем.

Несмотря на почти постоянное бездействие, демилич время от времени становится неспокойным, особенно когда рядом появляются живые существа. Только тогда в нем вновь пробуждается жажда жизни, и он начинает набрасываться с ужасающей силой, пытаясь поглотить жизненную энергию. В отличие от обычного лича, если разрушить череп демилича, его связь с миром навсегда прервется, однако некоторые выдвигают теории, что даже в этом случае он не будет убит по-настоящему. Скорее, некоторые считают, что после уничтожения демилича его скверный и измученный разум наконец-то может свободно бродить по планам и искать новые способы воплощения своей воли. Для недолговечного простого люда с Материального Плана этого вполне достаточно, однако спустя много веков демилич может вновь появиться в регионе, который он когда-то населял, с новым еще более коварным замыслом.

Чтобы получить больше времени для достижения своих целей, некоторые отчаянные заклинатели стремятся к бессмертию, принимая несмерть. После долгих лет исследований и создания специального контейнера, называемого клеткой души (прим.пер.: ранее называвшаяся филактерием), заклинатель делает последний шаг, употребляя смертоносное снадобье или творя ужасные заклинания, превращающие его в лича. Большинство из них идут на этот радикальный шаг, чтобы продолжить свою работу или выполнить какой-то долгосрочный план, но другие становятся личами, потому что боятся смерти или чтобы выполнить какую-то злобную цель, например, давно задуманную месть. Независимо от этого, результат является постоянным и несет в себе потенциал изменить историю — как тех, кто превращается, так и бесчисленных смертных, которые неизбежно пострадают из-за новой силы лича.

После своей метаморфозы лич часто находит для обитания какое-нибудь тихое место, обычно охраняемое различными стражами и ловушками, для двух основных целей. Во-первых, личу необходимо уединение, чтобы планировать свои сложные замыслы, а во-вторых, немногие смертные (если такие вообще есть) соизволят взаимодействовать с этими легендарно испорченными некромантами. Одна причина порождает другую, поскольку самоизоляция лича часто сводит его с ума, еще сильнее укрепляя его отрыв от цивилизации. Чем дольше живет лич, тем более дотошным планировщиком он становится, скрывая себя в лабиринте смертельных загадок, ложных путей и монстров. Слуги и стражи лича абсолютно верны, либо в силу своей природы (как конструкты или другая нежить), либо в результате внушения с помощью мощной магии. Многие личи со временем сходят с ума, и природа логова лича — хороший показатель текущего психического состояния этой нежити.

Несмотря на всю возводимую вокруг себя защиту, лич пойдет на всё, чтобы защитить свою клетку души, поскольку он знает, что разрушение этого магического контейнера означает для него гибель. Известно, что с личем трудно торговаться, однако угроза повредить его клетку души — верный способ одержать верх в переговорах.
Teyam Ishtori.allSaves: +1 состояния ко всем спасброскам от позитивных

items.name: Оцепенение
items.description: Как правило, при встрече демилич бездействует и не предпринимает никаких действий, пока не сработает его триггер @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WG91Z5TiR6oO5FOw]{Сопряженности}.

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам против жизненности
Сопряжённость
items.description:
Teyam has one permanent 8th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WG91Z5TiR6oO5FOw] spell in effect with one of its arcane innate spells of 5th level or lower as the companion spell- typically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8].

Триггер: While Teyam is in torpor, a creature disturbs Teyam's remains, touches her treasure, or casts a spell that would affect Teyam.

Эффект: Teyam ends torpor, rolls initiative, and gains the effect of her contingency's companion spell. The contingency resets after 24 hours.

items.name: Контрмеры
items.description:
Триггер: Teyam's turn begins.

Эффект: Teyam casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OOELvfkTedBMlWtq], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki] on itself. It usually chooses spell turning unless it already has that spell in effect.

items.name: Телекинетический вихрь
items.description: 20 feet. Telekinetic whirlwind activates when Teyam ends torpor. Loose debris in the area whip up into a whirling storm. This obscures vision, making any creature in the area concealed, and causes creatures in its area (except Teyam) to treat all creatures as concealed. Any creature other than Teyam that enters or begins its turn in the aura takes @Damage[2d12[bludgeoning]] damage.

items.name: Глаза-самоцветы демилича
items.description:
A demilich has gemstone eyes that glow when the demilich is active. Each eye contains an 8th-rank spell that targets one creature (usually one eye has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Oj1PJBMQD9vuwCv7] and the other @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BKIet436snMNcnez]). The demilich can Activate an eye. This uses the number of spellcasting actions the spell requires, and also requires command and envision components.

When the demilich casts a spell from a gemstone eye, that eye stops glowing for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}, during which time that eye's spell can't be used. Occasionally, one or both of the two @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Q4o8pEdxSY0bnJQZ]{Demilich Eye Gems} can be harvested from a destroyed demilich as magic items.

items.name: Пожирание души
items.description:
Требования: A soul has been trapped in one of Teyam's blight quartz gems for 24 hours.

Эффект: Teyam consumes the soul. The soul is utterly destroyed, and Teyam regains HP equal to double the creature's level.

items.name: Ментальная магия
items.description: Teyam can replace all material and somatic components for casting spells with verbal components, and can replace all Interact components for activating magic items with envision components.

items.name: Самоцветы посоха
items.description: Teyam long ago absorbed the spells from a staff into gemstone nodules embedded in her skull, with larger nodules representing higher-rank spells. She can cast any of the spells as though it were Activating the staff, and regains 1 charge per 4 hours spent in torpor, to a maximum of 10 charges. Teyam has the spells from a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.6m9niDjhA6tBfp5x]

items.name: Поймать душу
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день за самоцвет

Эффект: Ten blight quartz gemstones on Teyam's skull can trap the souls of the living. The Activated gem casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYmXvS9NJ7QwfWGg]. This bind soul can target and affect a dying creature instead of a corpse. The dying creature can attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:43] save; if it succeeds, it doesn't die and its soul is not trapped but it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (or is unaffected entirely on a critical success). When the soul of a creature gets trapped, the creature's body swiftly turns to dust.

The gemstones work like the black sapphires used in bind soul, except that they can hold creatures of up to 17th level and have a value of 200 gp apiece. Teyam can Devour a Soul it has trapped.

Tixitog.name: Tixitog
Tixitog.description:
Tixitogs are a species of bizarre aberrations that make their homes in the dens of giant spiders. Immune to poison and able to traverse sticky webs thanks to the thick slime that covers their bodies, tixitogs steal food cocooned in spider lairs and prey on spiders themselves, but they are careful never to kill so many that their food supply runs out. Their favorite meal, however, is the odd adventurer or spelunker who stumbles into their nest.

These strange creatures have oblong bodies coated in a viscous and transparent slime, three large black eyes, and eight thick, multi-jointed limbs, four of which are inverted and point upward, allowing the monster to easily crawl on either the ceiling or floor of narrow caverns and squeeze through narrow spaces. Their jaws appear small and tubular when closed but peel apart and stretch to terrifying proportions when opened, as their dozens of pointed teeth part to reveal a freakishly long tongue.

A tixitog usually hides from the spiders in the lair it has claimed, not out of fear but to keep the spiders from abandoning the lair and moving elsewhere. When a tixitog emerges from the shadows, most spiders flee from it rather than attack, and the tixitog uses this behavior to direct entire swarms of spiders where it pleases. This is typically bad news for bands of adventurers who find themselves within a tixitog's lair; in the mass hysteria caused by a skittering swarm of spiders headed straight toward them, spelunkers typically fail to notice the more dangerous threat that follows closely behind.

items.name: Web Sense (Imprecise) 60 feet
items.description: The tixitog can detect the vibrations of creatures touching a web that the tixitog is also touching.

items.name: Проглотить целиком
items.description:
Маленький, @Damage[(1d12+3)[bludgeoning]], Разрыв 10

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

items.name: Подтянуть языком
items.description: When a tixitog hits a Small or smaller creature with its tongue Strike, the target is pulled into the tixitog's mouth. The tixitog can then attempt to Swallow it Whole.

Town Hall Fire.name: Town Hall Fire
Town Hall Fire.descriptionHazard: A fire engulfs the western door and a @Template[square|distance:10]{10-foot-by-10-foot area} immediately east of it, then spreads on each of its turns.
Town Hall Fire.disable:
Eliminating the hazard requires dousing the flames. Water typically clears a 5-foot square if the amount is small (such as that from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WzLKjSw6hsBhuklC] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jfVCuOpzC6mUrf6f]). Larger amounts of water, such as a full bucket, typically douse a @Template[square|distance:10]{10-foot-by-10-foot area} (or 4 squares in some other shape). Throwing a bucket of water on flames requires an Interact action. A waterskin doesn't contain enough water to put out even 1 square of fire. Cold can also put out fire, but only if the cold can affect an area; cold is usually less effective than water, so a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.EpxmUtLpCkE8R6KJ]{Frost Vial} typically puts out 1 square of fire, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gYjPm7YwGtEa1oxh] is ineffective.

Fountain Circle, located outside town hall, has several working water pumps. These are far enough away that it's impractical for a PC to bring water back and forth. However, a PC might instruct the more steely nerved spectators to create a bucket brigade. It takes 15 spectators (which can include those rescued by councilors as well as by PCs) to set this up, and 2 rounds for the townspeople to line up and begin pumping water from Fountain Circle. As of the 3rd round, there is a bucket of water available for the PCs to use at the chamber's southern entrance at the beginning of each PC's turn. Members of a bucket brigade are lined up outside the chamber, and don't take damage from smoke inhalation.

If a PC does want to carry the water, it's 150 feet from the chamber's southern door to a pump, so it 6 actions are usually needed to reach the pumps or return. Filling a bucket requires an Interact action.

Other methods might also help control the fire, as you determine. For example, the PCs might be able to find something to barricade the fire with to control its path, or use a cloak to beat out some of the fire.
Town Hall Fire.routine:
On its turn, the fire spreads into a number of additional squares equal to half the number of squares the fire currently occupies, with a minimum of 1 square. You determine the squares the fire spreads into-typically those with the most flammable materials. Any creature that ends its turn next to the flames takes @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage, and any creature within the flames takes @Damage[4d6[fire]] damage. Both of these have a @Check[reflex|dc:17|basic|traits:complex,environmental,fire,hazard] save. A creature can take damage from flames only once per round. (For simplicity, track damage only for the NPCs and their allies, not for the spectators; Turn 5 and Turn 7 have instructions regarding the spectators' health).

The fire has an additional effect on each of its turns after the first.

Turn 2: The chamber's northern door flies open and flames burst through, igniting the @Template[square|distance:10]{10-foot-by-10-foot area} in front of the door. All fires spread on subsequent turns, at the same rate listed above. Any fires that join together become one fire for this purpose.

Turn 4+: Creatures in the room take @Damage[1d6[untyped]] damage from smoke inhalation at the ends of their turns. Anyone who uses an Interact action to tie a wet rag around their nose and mouth (or uses another creative solution) halves the damage.

Turn 5: Spectators still inside the room fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf] from burns and smoke inhalation.

Turn 7: Spectators still in the room die.

Trapped Lathe.name: Trapped Lathe
Trapped Lathe.descriptionHazard: The powered lathe's springs have been critically overwound so that when jostled or triggered, the lathe unwinds violently, hurling blades, gears, and sharp shards of metal around the room.
Trapped Lathe.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:31|name:Release the Spring Tension|traits:complex,mechanical,trap,hazard] (expert) on the lathe releases the tension on its springs without unleashing its blades and gears.
Trapped Lathe.routine: (4 actions) The lathe attempts four sharpened fragment attacks against creatures in the room, selecting a target randomly from all available targets in area A1. The trap does not take multiple attack penalties for any of its attacks. The trap loses 1 action each turn as its springs wind down, and becomes disabled when it has 0 actions.
Trapped Lathe.stealth: (expert); @Check[perception|dc:29|name:Notice the Line of Cord|traits:complex,mechanical,trap,hazard] to notice the line of cord running from the lathe's trigger toward the door to area A2.

items.name: Unleash Fragments
items.description:
Триггер: The lathe is jostled or damaged, or its trigger is remotely pulled.

Эффект: The trap makes a sharpened fragment Strike against a random target in area A1, then rolls for initiative.

items.name: Persistent Bleed Critical
items.description: The sharpened fragments deal @Damage[1d8[bleed]] on a critical hit.

Tree of Dreadful Dreams.name: Tree of Dreadful Dreams
Tree of Dreadful Dreams.descriptionHazard: The statue of the willow tree animates, its branches lashing out to try to grab anyone in area B2.
Tree of Dreadful Dreams.disable: @Check[athletics|dc:25|name:Force Open a Branch|traits:complex,magical,trap,hazard,action:force-open] or @Check[thievery|dc:25|name:Lever Open a Branch|traits:complex,magical,trap,hazard] (trained) to force or lever open a single branch, disabling that branch and freeing any creature trapped within. @Check[thievery|dc:29|name:Disrupt the Tree's Magical Animation|traits:complex,magical,trap,hazard] (expert) to disrupt the tree's magical animation, shut it down, and free all trapped creatures. Placing a dreamstone in the tree's trunk takes 2 Interact actions and causes the trap to shut down, freeing all trapped creatures. Placing the cursed dreamstone from area B4 in the trunk instead increases the tree's actions per turn to 4 and gives it a +2 item bonus to all saving throws and attack rolls.
Tree of Dreadful Dreams.reset: The trap deactivates and resets if it has no creatures @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] and no creatures in the room to attack. If an uncursed dreamstone is placed in its trunk, the statue doesn't reactivate.
Tree of Dreadful Dreams.routine: (3 actions) The statue uses each action to attempt a branch Strike against a random creature in the room that it hasn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]. If there are no creatures for it to attack and it has at least one creature grabbed, it instead Constricts. The trap can have up to six creatures grabbed.

items.name: Сжимать
items.description:
@Damage[(1d10+12)[bludgeoning]], простой спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:27|basic]{Стойкости}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

items.name: Terrifying Visions
items.description: A creature that begins its turn grabbed by the trap experiences vivid, warped visions of true events and must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:31|traits:damaging-effect] save or take @Damage[4d8[mental]] damage. On a critical failure, the creature also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}. A creature that succeeds at its save is temporarily immune for 24 hours.

items.name: Возможность для атаки (особая)
items.description:
The tree of dreadful dreams can attempt up to six Attacks of Opportunity each round.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]

items.name: Independent Limbs
items.description: Any creature struck by the tree's Branch strike are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]. Additionally the tree's Branch strikes do not suffer from multiple attack penalties.

items.name: Winged Boots
items.description:
Made from soft leather, with delicate white wings attached to the heel, these boots are ensorcelled with powerful air magic.

Whenever you fall while wearing these boots, the boots automatically cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TTwOKGqmZeKSyNMH] on you. This benefit can't trigger again for 10 minutes.

Активация: 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F], команда

Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: You speak a command word and click the boots' heels together to cause the wings to animate and flap rapidly, granting you a fly Speed of 30 feet for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.1S51uIRb9bnZtpFU]{Effect: Winged Boots}

items.name: Wasp Trapped in Amber
items.description: Portal Key

items.name: Perfect Will
items.description: If Uri rolls a success on a Will saving throw, he gets a critical success instead; if he rolls a critical failure on a Will save, he gets a failure instead.

items.name: Punish Imperfection
items.description:
Триггер: A creature within Uri's reach fails an attack roll, saving throw, or skill check

Эффект: Uri makes an unarmed Strike against the triggering creature. If the attack hits, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:41] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} until the end of its next turn (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4} on a critical failure).

items.name: Reactionary
items.description: Uri can use 2 reactions in a round, but he can't perform the same reaction more than once per round.

items.name: Slash and Slam
items.description: Uri makes two Strikes: one with his scimitar and one with his shield spikes. If both hit, the overwhelming power of the attack leaves the target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} if one of the Strikes was a critical hit, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} if both Strikes were critical hits). These Strikes count as one attack for Uri's multiple attack penalty, and the penalty doesn't increase until after both attacks.

items.name: Swift Capture
items.description:
Требования: Uri has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.5zkoqnp6X5yPCXVy]{Manacles} in his possession and is adjacent to a creature

Эффект: Uri sheathes a weapon he's carrying, then attempts to bind the creature's wrists or ankles with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.5zkoqnp6X5yPCXVy]{Manacles}. If Uri succeeds at an attack roll with a [[/r 1d20+36 #Manacles]]{+36 modifier} against the target's AC, he applies the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.5zkoqnp6X5yPCXVy]{Manacles}.

items.name: Swift Slash
items.description: Uri Strides and makes a scimitar Strike at any point during the Stride.

items.name: Бонус состояния +2 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Бонус состояния +3 ко всем спасброскам от сакральной магии
Насмешка над божественным
items.description:
Триггер: Существо в радиусе 30 футов творит @Trait[Divine]{сакральное} заклинание или использует @Trait[Divine]{сакральное} умение

Требования: Vaklish has an unexpended spell slot that can be used to cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG].

Эффект: Vaklish expends a spell slot that could be used to cast dispel magic and attempts to counteract the triggering spell or ability.

Vaklish can't Scoff at the Divine for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Scoff at the Divine]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Изменение формы
items.description:
Vaklish takes on the appearance of any Medium humanoid. This doesn't change Valish's Speed or the attack and damage modifiers with his Strikes but might change the damage type his Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning). He typically loses his fangs Strike unless the humanoid form has fangs or a similar unarmed attack.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

items.name: Тревожное видение
items.description:
Vaklish's eyes flash green as it projects a telepathic wave in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. All creatures in the area are assailed by a vision of evil decadence from one of the rakshasa's past lives. Each non-evil creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:32] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} on a critical failure).

The visions last [[/gmr 1d4 #Duration Disturbing Vision]]{1d4 rounds}, and while they do, Vaklish and all evil creatures in the area gain a +1 status bonus to all checks. Vaklish can use this ability again only once the previous visions end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.AThOnEYzPO9ssYTB]

Vazgorlu.name: Vazgorlu
Vazgorlu.description: The arthropod monstrosity known as a vazgorlu makes its home on the Astral Plane or inside of a stable portal, ambushing creatures that travel there using dimensional magic.

items.name: Plane Shift (To and From the Vazgorlu's Demiplane Only)
Hostile Juxtaposition
items.description:
Триггер: A creature targets the vazgorlu with a Strike

Эффект: The vazgorlu chooses a different creature within 60 feet and attempts to swap places with that creature using @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8] in the instant before the Strike. The target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:39|traits:arcana] save.

Критический успех: The target resists the teleportation, and the vazgorlu can't use Hostile Juxtaposition for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Hostile Juxtaposition]]{1d4 rounds}.

Успех: The target resists the teleportation.

Провал: The target and the vazgorlu instantly swap places, and the triggering Strike is resolved against the target instead.

Критический провал: As failure, but the target is transported to the vazgorlu's demiplane after resolving the triggering Strike against it.

items.name: Demiplane Lair
items.description: A vazgorlu maintains a 30-foot-diameter demiplane in the Astral Plane. Gravity in this demiplane pulls out from the center, so that creatures can walk upon the inner surface. A vazgorlu's demiplane lair lacks a built-in point of exit, and if the vazgorlu fails to visit the demiplane during a 24-hour period, the demiplane collapses- all objects and creatures within are then returned to their original locations in the multiverse before they entered the demiplane. A vazgorlu can create a replacement demiplane lair with 24 hours of concentration.

items.name: Dimensional Tether
items.description: A creature hit by a vazgorlu's web Strike is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe] and stuck to the nearest surface until it [[/act escape dc=42]]{Escapes}. As long as it remains immobilized by the web, the web attempts to counteract any effect that would move the webbed creature to another plane, with a counteract rank of 10 and using the vazgorlu's [[/r 1d20+38 #Dimensional Tether Counteract]]{Arcana} skill to attempt the counteract check.

items.name: Redirect Portal
items.description: A vazgorlu can spend 10 minutes in contact with a magical portal to redirect it, causing the portal to instead lead to its demiplane lair. To do so, the vazgorlu must succeed at a [[/r 1d20+41 #Redirect Portal]]{Portal Lore} check (the DC is either equal to the caster's spell DC for a portal created by a spell, or set by the portal's level; if the portal in question has no level listed, assume it's a 20th-level portal).

Veshumirix.name: Veshumirix
Veshumirix.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Устрашающее присутствие
items.description:
90 футов. Спасбросок @Check[will|dc:34|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened]{Воли}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

items.name: Отражение крылом
items.description:
Триггер: Veshumirix is targeted with an attack.

Эффект: Veshumirix raises his wing, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If Veshumirix is Flying, he descends 10 feet after the attack.

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description:
Veshumirix breathes a blast of magma that deals @Damage[9d6[fire],4d12[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]{9d6 fire damage and 4d12 bludgeoning damage} in a @Template[cone|distance:60] (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect] save).

He can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Драконье неистовство
items.description: Veshumirix makes two claw Strikes and one horns Strike in any order.

items.name: Драконий импульс
items.description: Veshumirix recharges his Breath Weapon whenever he scores a critical hit with a Strike.

items.name: Плавание в магме
items.description: Скорость плавания магматического дракона действует только когда он @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Плавает} в магме или расплавленной лаве.

items.name: Вулканическая обдувка
items.description:
If the next action Veshumirix uses is Breath Weapon, the magma clings to those it damages. Each creature that fails its save against the Breath Weapon takes @Damage[4d6[persistent,fire]] damage, and as long as it has this persistent fire damage, it also takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.7qoZauizAKfPIXeu]

Vision of Dahak.name: Vision of Dahak
Vision of Dahak.descriptionHazard: Blasts of fire and smoke pour out of the tunnel walls to coalesce into the burning form of Dahak himself; a PC who succeeds at a @Check[religion|dc:20|name:Recognize Depiction of Dahak|traits:hazard,complex,fire,magical,trap,action:recall-knowledge] check to Recall Knowledge notes that the fiery dragon closely resembles classical depictions of the draconic god of destruction.
Vision of Dahak.disable: @Check[religion|dc:26|name:Counteract Dahak With Prayers|traits:complex,fire,magical,trap,hazard] (expert) to utter prayers to a non-evil deity to counteract Dahak's presence (prayers to Apsu allow this check to be made if the character is merely trained in Religion), @Check[thievery|dc:30|name:Divert the Hazard's Energy Back|traits:complex,fire,magical,trap,hazard] (expert) to divert the hazard's energies back upon themselves, or a successful @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (4th rank; counteract DC 26).
Vision of Dahak.reset: The vision of Dahak deactivates and resets automatically once no creatures remain within the Huntergate way station.
Vision of Dahak.routine: (2 actions) The vision of Dahak manifests next to the creature that is closest to the center of the way station, then uses its Breath Weapon in a direction that catches the most possible targets in its area.

items.name: Manifest
items.description:
Триггер: A creature is within the way station.

Эффект: The vision of Dahak appears in a 15-foot space adjacent to that creature and rolls initiative.

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description: The vision of Dahak unleashes a blast of fire from its burning maw, creating a @Template[cone|distance:60] that deals @Damage[6d6[fire]] damage to all creatures within (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic|traits:magical,trap,hazard] save).

items.name: +1 Dagger (Bonded Item)
items.description: Это маленькое острое оружие держится одной рукой и используется, чтобы бить существ в ближнем бою. Еще его можно метать.

items.name: Истощить предмет силы
items.description:
When Voz uses this ability, she also regains 1 Focus Point.

Частота: Раз в день

You expend the power stored in your bonded item, as long as the item is on your person. During your turn, you gain the ability to cast one spell you prepared today and already cast, without spending a spell slot. You must still @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast the Spell} and meet the spell's other requirements.

items.name: Eschew Materials
items.description: You can use clever workarounds to replicate the arcane essence of certain materials. When Casting a Spell that requires material components, you can provide these material components without a spell component pouch by drawing intricate replacement sigils in the air. Unlike when providing somatic components, you still must have a hand completely free. This doesn't remove the need for any materials listed in the spell's cost entry.

items.name: Досягаемое заклинание
items.description: You can extend the range of your spells. If the next action you use is to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz] that has a range, increase that spell's range by 30 feet. As is standard for increasing spell ranges, if the spell normally has a range of touch, you extend its range to 30 feet.

Wailing Crystals.name: Wailing Crystals
Wailing Crystals.descriptionHazard: Three clusters of gleaming, colorful crystals are corrupted with necromantic energy that causes them to reflect negative emotions. All three must be disabled or destroyed to negate the hazard.
Wailing Crystals.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:29|name:Fracture the Crystals|traits:hazard,complex,environmental,magical] (master) to carefully fracture the crystals or @Check[crafting|dc:27|name:Stop the Resonance|traits:hazard,complex,environmental,magical] (expert) to place objects to stop the resonance, both disabling one 5-foot patch of crystals.
Wailing Crystals.reset: The wailing crystals deactivate and reset once no living creatures are within 20 feet.
Wailing Crystals.routine: (3 actions) The hazard uses each action for an Anguished Shriek. The wailing crystals lose 1 action for each 5-foot patch of crystals that is broken or destroyed.
Wailing Crystals.stealth: (master) or @Check[perception|dc:37|name:Notice Ghostly Faces|traits:hazard,complex,environmental,magical] (master) to notice what appear to be screaming ghostly faces in the crystals

items.name: HP is 72 for each 5 foot patch
Echoing Cry
items.description:
Триггер: A living creature approaches within 20 feet of a wailing crystal.

Эффект: A despairing chorus of cries echoes off the crystals, working its way into the minds of all living creatures in Jewelgate Way Station, affecting them with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN] (7th level, @Check[will|dc:33|name:Crushing Despair|traits:mental,emotion,magical,spell] save).

The hazard rolls initiative.

items.name: Anguished Shriek
items.description: A shrieking, distorted face composed of writhing necromantic energy lances out of the crystals to target a random living creature within 20 feet. The target takes @Damage[4d6[mental],4d6[sonic]]{4d6 mental damage and 4d6 sonic damage} (@Check[will|dc:33|basic] save).

items.name: History of the Bumblebrashers in Isger
Религиозный символ Дезны
items.description: Этот кусок дерева или серебра гравирован изображением, представляющим божество. Некоторые сакральные заклинатели, такие как жрецы, могут использовать религиозный символ своего божества как сакральный фокус при использовании некоторых умений и сотворении некоторых заклинаний. Чтобы использовать религиозный символ, его надо держать в одной руке.

items.name: Scholar's Robes
items.description: Обычная одежда имеет базовый пошив, такой как одежда для крестьян, монашеская одежда или рабочая одежда.

items.name: Гоблинское увиливание
items.description:
Триггер: A goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to Warbal.

Эффект: Warbal @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Steps}.

Weathered Wail.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Heatsight
items.description: Тепловое зрение это точное чувство, которое видит тепловые сигнатуры.

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Преследование снов
items.description: Цель, провалившая свой спасбросок против @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Uqj344bezBq3ESdq]{Кошмара} вендиго подвергается мучению вендиго.

items.name: Вой
items.description:
Частота: 3 раза в день

Эффект: Вендиго издает тоскливый вой, который слышен на расстоянии вплоть до @Unit[Mile|1]{1 мили}. Любое существо, услышавшее этот вой, должно преуспеть в спасброске @Check[will|dc:38|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened,inflicts:fleeing]{Воли}, иначе станет @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 1}. Любое существо, которое критически провалило и находится в радиусе 120 футов от вендиго, вместо этого @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 3}, а также впадает в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D] на [[/gmr 1d4 #раунды]]{1d4 раунда} (или пока не перестанет быть напуганным, в зависимости от того, что наступит раньше).

Существо, напуганное воем вендиго, естественным образом восстанавливается от испуга, но не может таким образом снизить величину состояния напуган ниже 1, пока не пройдёт 1 час или не будет использована магия. Независимо от успеха или провала, существо временно иммунно к "Вою" этого вендиго на 24 часа.

items.name: Скачка по ветру
items.description:
Триггер: The wendigo casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.U0hL0LLaprcnAyzC] while it has Grabbed a foe.

Эффект: The wendigo attempts to turn the grabbed creature into wind and carry it along as part of the action. If the target succeeds at a @Check[will|dc:38] save, it prevents itself from being transformed; in this case, the wendigo still transforms, automatically releasing the victim. A creature forced to Ride the Wind along with the wendigo is exposed to wendigo torment.

The target can attempt a new Will save each round to return to normal, though it immediately becomes corporeal and begins falling if it succeeds.

items.name: Мучение вендиго
items.description:
Существо, пораженное мучением вендиго, не может восстановиться дальше стадии 1, пока не будет восстановлено до полных ОЗ.

Спасбросок: @Check[will|dc:38]

Стадия 1: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Одурманен 4} (1 день)

Стадия 2: как стадия 1 (1 день)

Стадия 3: The creature searches for an individual of its own ancestry to kill and devour. It then becomes affected by wind walk and sprints into the sky so fast that its feet burn away into jagged stumps. As the creature wind walks into the sky, it is replaced by a new wendigo over [[/br 2d6 #minutes]]{2d6 minutes}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu], аналогичная магия или ритуал @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kqhPt9344UkcGVYO] 9-го ранга могут вернуть жертву к жизни. Новый вендиго остается, даже если жертва будет воскрешена.

Wrath of the Destroyer.name: Wrath of the Destroyer
Wrath of the Destroyer.descriptionHazard: These heavy doors, carved with an image of Dahak, echo with a hatred so powerful that it can kill anyone who comes nearby, manifesting a vision of Dahak's head emerging from the doors to strike at a foe.
Wrath of the Destroyer.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:29|name:Disrupt the Divine Magic|traits:complex,magical,trap,hazard] (expert) to disrupt the divine magic, @Check[religion|dc:29|name:Placate Wrathful Energies|traits:complex,magical,trap,hazard] (expert) to placate the wrathful energies, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (5th rank; counteract DC 26).
Wrath of the Destroyer.reset: The trap deactivates and resets if 1 minute passes without any creature being in range.
Wrath of the Destroyer.routine: (1 action) On its initiative, the wrath of the destroyer targets the closest target in area C6 with Face of the Fatal Divine.
Wrath of the Destroyer.stealth: (expert) to notice subtle vapors of magical energy seething across the doors

items.name: Expunge
items.description:
Триггер: A non-worshipper of Dahak touches either door leading to C7

Эффект: The hazard targets the creature with Face of the Fatal Divine, then rolls initiative.

items.name: Face of the Fatal Divine
items.description: The creature beholds the face of Dahak as it emerges to bite with its burning jaws, targeting the creature with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tlcrVRqW1MSKJ5IC] (5th level, @Check[will|dc:29|traits:complex,hazard,magical,trap]).

Xevalorg.name: Xevalorg
Xevalorg.description:
Самая ужасная черта гуга — его бочкообразная голова, которая вертикально раскрывается, открывая многочисленные ряды острых желтых зубов и раскрытое горло. Его глаза, расположенные по обе стороны головы-челюсти, маленькие, но зоркие. Костяные гребни защищают глаза от бешеного брыкания добычи, поскольку он предпочитает питаться сырым и извивающимся мясом, а не грибами и плесенью. Он хватает добычу мощными руками, разделяющимися в локте на пару предплечий, которые дают ему четыре когтистые лапы. Эти монструозные громилы покрыты лохматым черным мехом, зачастую с запекшейся кровью.

Хотя гуги могут показаться звероподобными, они обладают острым и злобным разумом. Гуги устраивают логова далеко под землей, но иногда выходят на поверхность, чтобы темной ночью поохотиться в одиночку или небольшими группами. Поскольку у них прожорливый аппетит, большинство гугов съедают пойманных ими существ, но некоторые похищают своих жертв и уходят под поверхность, оставляя после себя лишь стойкое зловоние и странные отпечатки когтистых лап. Жертв уводят в прогорклые логова, помеченные странными рунами, и приносят в жертву своим злобным богам крови, тьмы и кошмаров. Страшные слухи рассказывают о лишенных света городах гугов, созданных глубоко под землей из титанических каменных глыб, где могущественные лидеры гугов проповедуют свои мерзкие доктрины толпам воющих гугов.

У гугов странные отношения с гулями, которые, похоже, имеют общее происхождение в далеком подземном мире. Гуги живут в страхе перед гулями, несмотря на то, что выше них; однако этот странный страх не распространяется на гастов, которых гуги поглощают так же прожорливо, как и других существ.

Рост гугов составляет @Unit[Foot|16]{16 футов}, а вес @Unit[Pound|2000]{2 000 фунтов}, однако у них жуткая, грациозная походка, противоречащая их огромным размерам. Их легкая поступь и способность протискиваться в самые маленькие щели, делают гугов распространенными страшилищами в историях о странных исчезновениях или кровавых расправах.

Некоторые особо кровожадные гуги получают ужасные силы в дар от своих мистических покровителей. Эти монстры известны как саванты, они по силе никогда не бывают ниже 12-го уровня, и они получают несколько врожденных оккультных заклинаний. Хотя точный набор заклинаний каждого саванта различен, обычно эти заклинания дают невидимость, позволяют манипулировать камнями и изменять их, или насылать на живую плоть ужасные и разрушительные энергии.

items.name: Жуткая гибкость
items.description: Despite his size, Xevalorg's multiple joints allow him to fit through tight spaces as if he were a Medium creature. While Squeezing, he can move at his full Speed.

items.name: Яростные когти
items.description: Xevalorg makes up to four claw Strikes, each against a different target. These attacks count toward Xevalorg's multiple attack penalty, and the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after he makes all his attacks.

Xotani, The Firebleeder.name: Xotani, The Firebleeder
Xotani, The Firebleeder.description:
A monstrosity of living flame and magma, Xotani may be the weakest of Rovagug's spawn, but it remains a formidable threat. Xotani was slain in 2104 AR by an alliance of spellcasters, but recently its deathlike slumber was interrupted. Its corpse twitches, signaling that it might be close to returning.

The spawn are titanic terrors of immense size and strength that live only to destroy. Tarrasque and Xotani are but two of Rovagug's spawn. Others, including Chemnosit (the Monarch Worm), Kothogaz (the Dance of Disharmony), and Volnagur (the End-Singer) hold places of horror in the history of various regions, but the most famed is Ulunat (the Unholy First), whose beetle-like carcass remains sprawled in Sothis, the capital of Osirion.
Xotani, The Firebleeder.language: не может говорить ни на одном языке

items.description:
Триггер: Xotani is damaged

Эффект: Xotani's wound erupts with magma in a @Template[cone|distance:30], dealing @Damage[6d8[fire],6d8[persistent,fire]|options:area-damage]{6d8 fire damage and 6d8 persistent fire damage} (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect] save).

items.name: Реагирующий
items.description: Xotani gains 3 reactions each round. It can still use only one reaction per trigger.

items.name: Bomb Barrage

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description:
Xotani breathes a blast of flame that deals @Damage[18d6[fire],4d6[persistent,fire]|options:area-damage]{18d6 fire damage plus 4d6 persistent fire damage} to all creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:70] (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect] save).

It can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Internal Furnace

Триггер: A creature adjacent to the Xotanispawn touches it or hits it with a physical attack

Эффект: The triggering creature takes @Damage[5d8[persistent,fire]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:37|traits:damaging-effect] save to negate).

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description:
The Xotanispawn sprays a @Template[cone|distance:60] of magma that deals @Damage[10d10[fire],2d6[persistent,fire]|options:area-damage]{10d10 fire damage and 2d6 persistent fire damage} to all creatures in the area (@Check[reflex|dc:39|basic|options:area-effect] save).

The Xotanispawn can't use its Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Heat Surge
items.description: When the Xotanispawn critically hits, its body surges with heat, increasing the damage of its Internal Furnace to @Damage[10d8[persistent,fire]] damage until the start of its next turn.

items.name: Adroit Disarm
items.description: The Zephyr Guard attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9] a creature, with a +2 circumstance bonus to the roll. On a critical success, the guard can also deal their @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.grmaV4GdoGD7sKbn] damage to the creature.

items.name: Мешающий выстрел
items.description: The Zephyr Guard makes a heavy crossbow Strike that deals one additional weapon damage die. If the Strike hits, the target takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}. These last for 1 round, or 2 rounds if the Strike was a critical success.

items.name: Subduing Strikes
items.description: A Zephyr Guard takes no penalty for making nonlethal attacks with a weapon that doesn't have the nonlethal trait. The guard's nonlethal Strikes against a creature that is not wielding a weapon deal an additional 2d6 damage.

items.name: Кислотная склянка [Большая, насыщенная]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Этот бутылек наполнен едкой кислотой, наносящей 1 кислотного урона, 3d6 продолжительного урона кислотой и 3 урона кислотными брызгами. Вы получаете бонус предмета +2 к броскам атаки.

items.name: Морозная склянка [Большая, насыщенная]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Жидкие реагенты внутри этого бутылька быстро поглощают тепло при контакте с воздухом. Вы получаете бонус предмета +2 к броскам атаки. Морозная склянка наносит 3d6 урона холодом и 3 урона холодом от брызг. При попадании цель получает штраф состояния −10 футов к своим Скоростям до конца своего следующего хода.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]

items.name: Камень грома [Большой, насыщенный]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Когда этот камень попадает по существу или твёрдой поверхности, он взрывается с оглушающим хлопком. Камень грома наносит 3d4 урона звуком, 3 урона звуком от брызг, и каждое существо в 10 футах от места взрыва должно преуспеть в спасброске @Check[fortitude|dc:28|name:Большой камень грома|showDC:all]{Стойкости}, иначе получит @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Глухоту} до конца своего следующего хода. Вы получаете бонус предмета +2 к броскам атаки.

items.name: Алхимический огонь [Большой, насыщенный]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Алхимический огонь это комбинация горючих жидкостей, которые загораются при контакте с воздухом. Алхимический огонь наносит 3d8 урона огнём, 3 продолжительного урона огнём и 3 урона огненными брызгами. Вы получаете бонус предмета +2 к броскам атаки.

items.name: Книга формул
items.description: Книга формул содержит формулы, необходимые для изготовления предметов, отличных от обычного снаряжения из этой главы (6-я в Основной книге правил); алхимики обычно получают одну бесплатно. Каждая книга формул может содержать формулы вплоть до 100 различных предметов. Формулы также могут быть на листах пергамента, планшетах или любом другом носителе; вам не нужно копировать их в конкретную книгу, пока вы можете держать их при себе, чтобы ссылаться на них.

items.description: Этот переносной набор пробирок и химикатов можно использовать для простых алхимических задач.

items.name: Расширенные брызги
items.description: Zuferian's bombs that have the splash trait deal 8 extra splash damage, and splash to 10 feet.

items.name: Быстрая алхимия
items.description: Zuferian creates a single alchemical item from her formula book. This item has the infused trait, but it remains potent only until the start of her next turn. With her typical preparations, she can use this ability 7 times per day.

items.name: Быстрый бомбометатель
items.description: Zuferian Interacts to draw a bomb, then Strikes with it.

items.name: Истинная ослабляющая бомба
items.description:
When Zuferian uses Debilitating Bomb, add the following to the list of effects Zuferian can choose from:

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}
  • a –15-foot status penalty to Speeds.

If Zuferian instead applies one of the effects listed in Debilitating Bomb, the target avoids the effect only if the result of its saving throw is a critical success.

items.name: Поразительные бомбы
items.description: When Zuferian throws an alchemical item with the bomb trait, its range increment increases to 60 feet, Zuferian reduces any circumstance bonus to the target's AC from cover by 1, and Zuferian automatically succeeds at the flat check when targeting a concealed creature.
